d8956d42e575864758176f061ace0b26.full_text:
Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh

Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. This retreat is a weekend reset for sincere seekers, experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness, or the weight of life's pressures; so they can reconnect to their own inner essence. A familiarity with Osho is a requirement - from reading his books, listening to his discourses or doing his meditation techniques and practices.

Includes:
• Kundalini and active dynamic meditations running through the day in the Buddha Hall and nature based spaces including the Ganga Ghats
• Range of accommodations to suit all budgets with room sharing options and private AC rooms. Starting price is ₹4300 for the 3 days, for dorm bed package.
• 3 satvik meals daily + some drinks included in cost.
• Meditations guided in Hindi and English.

Dates: 7 - 10th May
Venue: Dhyan Mandir, Lalkadi Ghat, Rishikesh
(Arrive 4pm first Day, Finish 2pm Last day)

Meet your facilitators:
- Dimpal
- Christine
- Sarju

7b4d1be8fd9d5af21bde6f89809228e1.title: Osho Meditation Retreat
7b4d1be8fd9d5af21bde6f89809228e1.description: Three-day meditation retreat at Osho Ashram featuring meditation sessions, accommodation, and meals for seekers and devotees.
7b4d1be8fd9d5af21bde6f89809228e1.full_text:
Next retreat 21-24 May 2026.

A review from our latest retreat 🤩

I have come to the Osho Ashram for a three-day retreat. One meditation session has just ended, and another is about to begin. This is our hall where the meditation takes place, and these are all the Swamis and seekers here between sessions.

The main reason I'm making this video is this: for anyone who has misconceptions about what happens at Osho—thinking it's like this or like that—let me clear it up for you.

It's only meditation. You get great sleep and good food. Everyone should come here. If you're already happy and doing well in life, it's not necessary, but I think you should experience everything life has to offer.

There are many Hindus here, people from Gujarat, and many Muslims as well...

To book the next one - WhatsApp +919058967526. (The only booking number).

#oshobliss #meditationcamp #osho #retreat rishikesh

06a66c3f3e069a22ebbe88cd7824cd4d.full_text:
OSHO Zen Tarot Reader's Training

Step into a journey beyond prediction… into awareness, intuition & inner clarity.
At the serene space of Zorba the Buddha, immerse yourself in the transformative wisdom of the Osho Zen Tarot.

This is not about telling the future - it's about understanding the present moment deeply

Learn to read the cards as a mirror of consciousness, decode emotions, patterns & energy blocks, and guide yourself & others with insight, presence & compassion.

Whether you're a seeker, healer, or simply curious— this training opens the door to meditation through awareness.

What you'll experience:
• Intuitive card reading techniques
• Deep connection with your inner voice
• Meditative processes & self-exploration
• Real-time practice & guidance

Let the cards become a doorway… from mind to no-mind, from confusion to clarity.

Venue: Zorba the Buddha, New Delhi
Limited seats | Prior registration required

6ef197dc25ef3215406eeb6ddbeeea65.description: Ecstatic dance, music, and meditation festival for spiritual awakening and inner transformation through movement.
6ef197dc25ef3215406eeb6ddbeeea65.full_text:
🔥🕉️ NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 💃✨
🌙 Dance Your Way Into Silence…

There are moments when words are not enough…
when the heart longs to express, release & celebrate 🌿

Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival is an invitation to move beyond the mind and enter a deeper experience of awareness through dance, music & meditation 🎶🕊️

Here, dance is not about perfection…
It is about freedom.
It is about losing yourself so completely in movement that only presence remains ✨

💫 When the body moves totally,
the mind becomes silent…
and meditation begins naturally.

Inspired by the spirit of celebration, devotion & consciousness, this festival creates a sacred space where movement transforms into inner awakening 🔥

🌸 Through ecstatic dance, music, meditation & collective energy, you may experience:

✨ Release of stress & emotional heaviness
✨ Deep relaxation & inner calm
✨ Joy, playfulness & freedom of expression
✨ A stronger connection with yourself & others
✨ Silence, awareness & meditative bliss

Like Shiva Nataraj - the cosmic dancer -
every movement becomes sacred, every breath becomes alive 🌺💃

No matter your age or experience, you are welcome exactly as you are 🌙
You do not need to know dance…
your soul already understands the rhythm ❤️

🌿 Open for both Women & Men
🎶 Celebrate • Dance • Meditate • Transform ✨

📍 Zorba The Buddha
📅 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival

📞 +91 93119 58352

💫 Come as you are…
Leave lighter, freer & more connected to your inner self 🌸

✨ At Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival, Dance becomes Meditation… and Celebration becomes a Path to the Divine. 🕉️🔥

#NatarajSpiritualDanceFestival #DanceMeditation #SpiritualDance #MeditationInMotion #ZorbaTheBuddha

7a2194e0a3dce9798b55dcf487b3919f.title: OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis
7a2194e0a3dce9798b55dcf487b3919f.description: Live online course exploring relaxation through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness. Learn to work gently with the unconscious for ease and rest.
7a2194e0a3dce9798b55dcf487b3919f.full_text:
Are you comfortable just being with yourself? 🌿

Many forms of stress come from the feeling that we always need to do something, solve something, improve something, or move somewhere else.

OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis explores relaxation from another angle: learning how to work gently with the unconscious so the body and mind can return to ease 🌹

Through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness, this live online course supports a more relaxed and natural relationship with yourself — one where rest becomes possible again.

🗓️ June 13th – 14th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • Sat & Sun • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 7th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "STRESS" in the comments.

"Relaxation comes to you when there is no urge for activity; the energy is at home, not moving anywhere. If a certain situation arises you will act, that's all, but you are not finding some excuse to act. You are at ease with yourself. Relaxation is to be at home."

Osho, Tantra: The Supreme Understanding, 4

#meditation #osho #awareness #stressmanagement #selfhypnosis #relaxation #innerwork #oshoonline

e220a0b1c566c029e79c46e5ed6991f5.description: 21-day meditative therapy using laughter, tears, and silence to dissolve emotional scars through total participation and awareness.
e220a0b1c566c029e79c46e5ed6991f5.full_text:
When was the last time you laughed so totally that thinking disappeared? 🌩️

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

🗓️ September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "ROSE" to explore the course and reserve your place.

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does." - Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

826ac8e8c127492aa91dfc6ac082f446.title: OSHO BodyLove for Women
826ac8e8c127492aa91dfc6ac082f446.description: Live online course for women to reconnect with their bodies through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry, softening self-criticism.
826ac8e8c127492aa91dfc6ac082f446.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one the world taught you to perform 🌹

"Over time, we can feel cut off from our own bodies… from who we truly are."
Kimaya

As women, many of us learned to see ourselves through expectations, appearance, and outside opinions. Over time, it can become difficult to feel truly connected to the body — or at ease inside it 🌿

OSHO BodyLove for Women is a live online course created for women who long to feel more relaxed, accepting, and at home in themselves through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry.

A space where self-criticism softens and a more natural connection with yourself begins to grow ✨

🗓️ June 6th & 7th, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 30th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "BODYLOVE" to explore the course.

#meditation #osho #awareness #bodylove #embodiedawareness #womenandmeditation #selfacceptance #oshoonline

d1a573f8c28aee0b6e5c58780a7a5d51.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one you see 🌹

So much energy goes into looking at ourselves from the outside.

OSHO BodyLove for Women explores another possibility: relating to the body through feeling, awareness, relaxation, movement, and presence 🌿

A live online course created for women who want a more loving and conscious connection with themselves — beyond image, performance, or self-judgment.

…. It is easier to enter godliness through the body of a woman than through the body of a man."

Osho, The Dhammapada: The Way of the Buddha, Vol. 5, 2

b62e6f367fd6cbf33124948c5f957342.description: Live online course exploring practical meditation methods to create space between you and your thoughts for cultivated presence.
b62e6f367fd6cbf33124948c5f957342.full_text:
Be here, not there 🌿

The mind is constantly pulling attention somewhere else: later, earlier, elsewhere.

OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind is a live online course exploring simple and practical meditation methods that create space between you and your thoughts — so presence becomes something felt, not forced.

A playful exploration of four ways to find the mind's off switch ✨

🗓️ May 18th – May 22nd, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 13th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "QUIET" in the comments, and get the invitation to the course in your DMs!

"As you become skillful, as you learn the knack of not getting involved in the mind, as you learn the art of remaining aloof, away from the mind, as you learn the science of creating a distance between you and your own thoughts, more and more meditation will be showering on you" Osho, Philosophia Perennis, Series 2, 5

#meditation #osho #awareness #mindfulness #meditationpractice #presence #innerpeace #consciousliving

75d168067ef5364e4f6284621b181fb1.title: Monsoon Festival – Osho Meditation Camp, Mount Abu
75d168067ef5364e4f6284621b181fb1.venue: Osho Abu Dham Resort, Peshua Village, Ahmedabad-Delhi Highway
75d168067ef5364e4f6284621b181fb1.description: 3-day Osho meditation camp in monsoon season with meditation, silence, music, and self-experience sessions led by Ma Prem Anjali and Ma Prasannata.
75d168067ef5364e4f6284621b181fb1.full_text:
🌿 MONSOON FESTIVAL – OSHO MEDITATION CAMP, MOUNT ABU 🌿

A golden opportunity to meet yourself amidst cool monsoon showers, green mountains, and a serene atmosphere…

You are invited to a deep, peaceful, and joyful Osho meditation camp.

✨ This special event is organized by Celebrate Life Retreat.

This camp will take you away from the daily rush and connect you with inner peace, love, and awareness.

In the loving presence of Ma Prem Anjali and Ma Prasannata, a journey of meditation, silence, music, and self-experience awaits you.

📍 VENUE:
Osho Abu Dham Resort, Peshua Village, Ahmedabad-Delhi Highway, Rajasthan

👉 This location is approximately 25-30 km from Mount Abu.
You can easily reach Mount Abu by train (Abu Road Station) or bus. From there, it is simple to reach the resort by taxi/auto.

🌧️ SPECIAL ATTRACTIONS IN MONSOON:
During the rainy season, this entire area becomes lush and green. The play of clouds on mountains, cool breeze, and serene atmosphere make it perfect for meditation.

Nearby, you can also enjoy beautiful places like Nakki Lake, Sunset Point, and Dilwara Jain Temple.

🗓️ DATES:
23 July (evening) to 26 July (afternoon)

💰 FEES (3-day full package – accommodation, meals, and all meditation sessions included):
• ₹4,900 per person – Double Sharing
• ₹3,900 per person – Triple Sharing
• ₹2,900 per person – Dormitory

🔸 Registration Fee: ₹1,500 (included in total fee)

📞 CONTACT:
📱 9810672814
📱 097839 08088 (Ashram contact number)

📝 Registration has started!
📲 For registration, contact: 9810672814

⚠️ Seats are limited, so advance booking is necessary.

✨ Come, this monsoon, embark on a journey within…
Where there is peace, love, and true joy awaiting you. 🌸

6c8a6717ead09b6eefe6e07e615579c2.title: Osho Mystic Rose
6c8a6717ead09b6eefe6e07e615579c2.description: 21-day meditative therapy: 7 days laughing (3 hrs/day), 7 days crying (3 hrs/day), 7 days silent meditation (3 hrs/day).
6c8a6717ead09b6eefe6e07e615579c2.full_text:
OSHO MYSTIC ROSE - Laughter, Tears, and Silence

For 21 days:
• Laugh for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
• Cry for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
• Sit silently for 3 hours a day, for 7 days

START DATE AND PARTICIPATION:
OSHO Mystic Rose starts on the 11th of every month at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. Whether you're in the Living-In program or joining from outside the Meditation Resort — the door is open.

MORE INFORMATION:
https://bit.ly/Join-OSHO-Mystic-Rose

RETURNING PARTICIPANTS:
Been through Mystic Rose before? Come back deeper, or simply to refresh. As a gesture of support, returning participants are invited again with a 50% contribution.

OSHO QUOTE:
"The first thing to be done is laughter, because that sets the trend for the whole day. If you wake up laughing, you will soon begin to feel how absurd life is. Nothing is serious: even your disappointments are laughable, even your pain is laughable, even you are laughable."
— Osho, Vedanta: Seven Steps to Samadhi, #1

#OSHOMysticRose #MeditativeTherapy #LaughterAndTears #OshoInternationalMeditationResort #MeditationRetreat

10ac6bf8fb9ea9e2e14200ff9d353983.title: Mystic Rose - 21 Day Online Meditative Therapy
10ac6bf8fb9ea9e2e14200ff9d353983.description: 21-day meditative therapy using laughter, tears, and silence to dissolve emotional scars. 3 hours daily. Free preview on June 24th.
10ac6bf8fb9ea9e2e14200ff9d353983.full_text:
Don't laugh it off — laugh it on!

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

Dates: September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
Format: LIVE Online Course
Duration: 21 days, 3 hours a day
Free Preview: June 24th, 2026

Explore the course and reserve your place: https://bit.ly/OSHO-MysticRose-Sep2026

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

— Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

c3b856a21b5a9ec7bf5921381b2e4efa.title: OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind™
c3b856a21b5a9ec7bf5921381b2e4efa.description: Live online course exploring reconnection with body's natural intelligence and developing a loving relationship with its signals over 7 days, 1 hour daily.
c3b856a21b5a9ec7bf5921381b2e4efa.full_text:
Your body is telling you something, are you listening?

"The body will never misguide you, you can trust it, and you can trust it absolutely."
Osho, The Rebellious Spirit, 22 ✨

OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind™ explores how to reconnect with the body's natural intelligence and develop a more loving relationship with its signals

This live online course supports a deeper understanding of what your body may be communicating — and how to respond with greater sensitivity and trust.

🗓️ June 16th – 22nd, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 7 days • 1 hour a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 9th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the details and book the course: https://bit.ly/OSHO-TalkingBodyMind-June2026

e8b4f0af58f9597261acfeb729194f07.title: Meditation Camp at Kasar Devi
e8b4f0af58f9597261acfeb729194f07.description: Meditation camp in the mountains at Kasar Devi, known for its strong geomagnetic field supporting deep meditation practice.
e8b4f0af58f9597261acfeb729194f07.full_text:
Our last retreat for May in Rishikesh was absolutely beautiful 🙏✨✨.

Thank you to all the wonderful participants who came and shared your energy with the group.

We took some of these sessions indoors when the temperature started to soar - to keep our focusing moving towards deep meditation.

So wonderful to meet you all. Life long connections definitely made.

In June we are taking our meditation camp up to Kasar Devi chasing the cooler climate. The mountains also being a special energy, and Kasar itself has an unusually strong geomagnetic field. This supports meditation with such ease.

If you'd like to join us in Kasar Devi, WhatsApp +919058967526.

And if you're wanting to join us in Rishikesh, follow @oshobliss_experiences to stay up to date with when we'll be back.

#osho #ओशो #rishikesh #ध्यानशिविर #activemeditation

d5bed0ef80ae3f9dae94fa3764a357d1.title: Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival
d5bed0ef80ae3f9dae94fa3764a357d1.description: Residential spiritual dance festival combining ecstatic dance, music and meditation for inner awakening and transformation.
d5bed0ef80ae3f9dae94fa3764a357d1.full_text:
🔥🕉️ NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 💃✨
🌙 Dance Your Way Into Silence…

There are moments when words are not enough…
when the heart longs to express, release & celebrate 🌿

Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival is an invitation to move beyond the mind and enter a deeper experience of awareness through dance, music & meditation 🎶🕊️

Here, dance is not about perfection…
It is about freedom.
It is about losing yourself so completely in movement that only presence remains ✨

💫 When the body moves totally,
the mind becomes silent…
and meditation begins naturally.

Inspired by the spirit of celebration, devotion & consciousness, this festival creates a sacred space where movement transforms into inner awakening 🔥

🌸 Through ecstatic dance, music, meditation & collective energy, you may experience:

✨ Release of stress & emotional heaviness
✨ Deep relaxation & inner calm
✨ Joy, playfulness & freedom of expression
✨ A stronger connection with yourself & others
✨ Silence, awareness & meditative bliss

Like Shiva Nataraj - the cosmic dancer -
every movement becomes sacred, every breath becomes alive 🌺💃

No matter your age or experience, you are welcome exactly as you are 🌙
You do not need to know dance…
your soul already understands the rhythm ❤️

🌿 Open for both Women & Men
🎶 Celebrate • Dance • Meditate • Transform ✨

📍 Zorba The Buddha
📅 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival

✨ What if healing isn't about "fixing" yourself…
but about returning to your natural frequency? 🎶

You carry more than thoughts inside you…
You carry unspoken emotions, suppressed energy & silent exhaustion. 🌙

And sometimes…
talking doesn't heal.

Because sound moves where words cannot.
It travels through the body… softening stress, opening emotions & calming the nervous system. 🤍

A vibration can release heaviness.
A chant can awaken silence.
A voice can become medicine.

✨ Meditation & Inner Silence
✨ Reconnecting with your authentic self

🎵 This isn't a music class…
It's a remembrance.

Of the voice you silenced.
Of the peace you've been searching for.
Of the rhythm your soul already knows. 🌿

✨ Come as you are…
and leave lighter, open & alive.

from mind to no-mind, from confusion to clarity. 🌌

56d3dba178c6b189557aba73b6f972c0.title: Nourishment Workshop with Jayesh
56d3dba178c6b189557aba73b6f972c0.description: Explore real nourishment through experiential practices. Create space to feel what truly fills you up and experience authentic emotional wellbeing.
56d3dba178c6b189557aba73b6f972c0.full_text:
What if nourishment was something you could practice, not just imagine?

Here are 3 tips to try right now:
💛 Pause for 30 seconds: Close your eyes and notice what actually feels good in your body right now.
💛 Feel warmth: think of a person, a place or any moment that made you smile… remember as if it's happening now.
💛 Give: a kind word, a hug, or a smile to someone nearby.

Real nourishment isn't an idea. It's something you recognize when you feel it.

Try the steps above. Notice what shifts.
You might be surprised how much is already there.

This is what we'll explore together in the Nourishment workshop with Jayesh. We'll create space to experience, in a very real way, what fills you up.

#Nourishment #SelfConnection #FeelMore #EmotionalWellbeing #AuthenticLiving

d9029e94cfe50afdee662befca8aeeff.title: Healing Sexual Trauma
d9029e94cfe50afdee662befca8aeeff.description: Conscious Sexuality workshop addressing sexual trauma through awareness, safety, and healing.
d9029e94cfe50afdee662befca8aeeff.full_text:
Healing Sexual Trauma | 25 June - 1 July

Consciousness Sexuality workshops at Humaniversity

Over the years, I have met thousands of people who carried a quiet question within themselves: "Why does something so natural feel so complicated?"

Sexuality is one of the most fundamental expressions of being human. It is present long before we understand it intellectually, and it continues to shape our sense of aliveness, confidence, and connection throughout life. And yet, for many people, sexuality is also one of the places where shame, confusion, and pain have settled most deeply.

Consciousness Sexuality workshops exist because sexuality is rarely given the space it truly needs. Not a space of advice, technique, or performance, but a space of awareness, safety, and honest meetings and communication.

At Humaniversity, sexuality work has been part of our therapeutic approach for decades. We have seen, again and again, that when sexuality is met with respect, awareness and friendship, it becomes a powerful gateway to healing, sovereignty, and joy.

With love,
Sambodhi

458b5ba547d200ad43a5a2d0a36c513f.title: May 2026 Rishikesh Meditation Camp
458b5ba547d200ad43a5a2d0a36c513f.description: Osho meditation retreat in Rishikesh with facilitators Christine and Sarju offering breathwork and meditation guidance.
458b5ba547d200ad43a5a2d0a36c513f.full_text:
May 2026 Rishikesh Meditation Camp – Meet Your Facilitators

Christine
Born in Australia, Christine has been on the path of inner exploration since 2008, when she began learning meditation at the London Buddhist Centre.

Previously working as a Humanities teacher up to management level, she realized that the best way to bring change to the world is to start from within oneself – so in 2021 she redirected her career towards conscious and spiritual work. She is trained in Osho meditation and other 'breathwork' (breathing processes); and for the past 5 years has facilitated meditation and breathwork in London (UK), Australia, India, at the Osho International Meditation Resort (Pune), as well as online.

In the UK, she has shared her work from psychiatric hospitals to schools for children with criminal tendencies, corporate wellness, and community relaxation sessions. Christine provides a safe space for emotional release, connecting with one's true nature, and experimenting with consciousness, so that individuals can become more empowered by knowing themselves and existence.

Sarju
Born in Gujarat (India), Sarju has been an Osho sannyasin since 2008.

Before this, he ran an oil mill and tire plant as an entrepreneur, and also worked in construction management in London.

While running his business in India, he often stayed for extended periods at Osho ashrams in Madhavpur, Mehsana, and Pune, where he had the opportunity to go deeply within himself. During his exploration of 'Zorba the Buddha,' he learned the great value of Zen discipline and incorporates this principle into his work, so that others can find and know their own truth.

Sarju began informally teaching friends breathing techniques and practices, which evolved into facilitating Osho meditation in 2022. He has conducted many intensive and personal sessions in London, at the Osho International Meditation Resort in Pune, and throughout India.

#MeditationCamp #Osho #OshoMeditation #osho #rishikesh

d056863a6aa9bbcc604a483634e8b4e1.title: Osho Meditation Retreat
d056863a6aa9bbcc604a483634e8b4e1.description: Three-day meditation retreat with meditation sessions, accommodation, and meals. Open to all seekers regardless of background.
d056863a6aa9bbcc604a483634e8b4e1.full_text:
Next retreat 21-24 May 2026.

A review from our latest retreat 🤩

I have come to the Osho Ashram for a three-day retreat. One meditation session has just ended, and another is about to begin. This is our hall where the meditation takes place, and these are all the Swamis and seekers here between sessions.

The main reason I'm making this video is this: for anyone who has misconceptions about what happens at Osho—thinking it's like this or like that—let me clear it up for you.

It's only meditation. You get great sleep and good food. Everyone should come here. If you're already happy and doing well in life, it's not necessary, but I think you should experience everything life has to offer.

There are many Hindus here, people from Gujarat, and many Muslims as well...

To book the next one - WhatsApp +919058967526. (The only booking number).

d24b939ced482f9b01c3f46dff1c9ec6.full_text:
Circle of Mystical Dances

Unlock your true essence every Thursday evening!

Through free-form dance, celebration & deep meditation.
Rooted in Osho's timeless wisdom & yogic flow.
Movement becomes a doorway to silence, bliss & balance.

Explore 1 of 14 transformative conscious dances weekly:

❤️ Heart Dance – Open your heart's wild rhythm!
🔥 Elemental Dance – Channel earth, fire, water, air!
🌀 Chakra Dance – Activate your energy centers.
⏹️ OSHO Gurdjieff Stop Dance – Sudden awareness bursts!
🎨 Creative Movement Therapy – Heal through expression.
🦋 Dance of Evolution – Journey through life's stages!
🌀 Sufi Whirling Primal Dance – Spin into the divine.
🌌 OSHO No-Dimensions – Beyond mind, pure freedom!
🤝 Contact Improvisation – Connect body to body.
🌊 5Rhythms – Flow through stillness, chaos, lyrical!
🙏 Gurdjieff Sacred Dances – Ancient patterns of awakening.
🎉 Ecstatic Dance – Let go & surrender to joy!
☮️ Dances of Universal Peace – Harmony in unity.

Venue: Zorba the Buddha, Osho Mystical Village – a safe haven for joyful self-expression & inner exploration.

Sessions start at 7 PM: Mystical dance immersion.
Followed by organic buffet dinner in communal bliss!

No dance experience required – just presence & openness!
Beginners & experts welcome to this sacred circle.

Real Transformations:
"Reconnected with my inner child–pure magic!" – Sameera
"Stunning meditative dances. I live for Thursdays!" – Riya

Schedule: Every Thursday, 7 PM onwards
Contact: +91 93119 58352
Venue: Zorba The Buddha, 7, Tropical Drive, Ghitorni, Mehrauli-Gurgaon Rd, New Delhi-110030

Join our 'Circle of Mystical Dances' WhatsApp group!
Build meaningful bonds with like-minded spiritual souls.

Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. This retreat is a weekend reset for sincere seekers, experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness, or the weight of life's pressures; so they can reconnect to their own inner essence. A familiarity with Osho is a requirement - from reading his books, listening to his discourses or doing his meditation techniques and practices.

Includes:
• Kundalini and active dynamic meditations running through the day in the Buddha Hall and nature based spaces including the Ganga Ghats
• Range of accommodations to suit all budgets with room sharing options and private AC rooms. Starting price is ₹4300 for the 3 days, for dorm bed package.
• 3 satvik meals daily + some drinks included in cost.
• Meditations guided in Hindi and English.

7 - 10th May

Dhyan Mandir, Lalkadi Ghat, Rishikesh

*(Arrive 4pm first Day, Finish 2pm Last day)

8f210b3f88fdde700d7b17c1a07414cf.title: OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis
8f210b3f88fdde700d7b17c1a07414cf.description: Live online course exploring relaxation through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness to develop a more relaxed relationship with yourself.
8f210b3f88fdde700d7b17c1a07414cf.full_text:
Are you comfortable just being with yourself? 🌿

Many forms of stress come from the feeling that we always need to do something, solve something, improve something, or move somewhere else.

OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis explores relaxation from another angle: learning how to work gently with the unconscious so the body and mind can return to ease 🌹

Through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness, this live online course supports a more relaxed and natural relationship with yourself — one where rest becomes possible again.

🗓️ June 13th – 14th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • Sat & Sun • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 7th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "STRESS" in the comments.

"Relaxation comes to you when there is no urge for activity; the energy is at home, not moving anywhere. If a certain situation arises you will act, that's all, but you are not finding some excuse to act. You are at ease with yourself. Relaxation is to be at home."

Osho, Tantra: The Supreme Understanding, 4

#meditation #osho #awareness #stressmanagement #selfhypnosis #relaxation #innerwork #oshoonlin

f3f8bb58317f193a5cc18b26bcc58378.title: Mystic Rose - 21 Day Meditative Therapy
f3f8bb58317f193a5cc18b26bcc58378.description: 21-day meditative therapy with three phases: laughter, tears, and silence. 3 hours daily. Free preview on June 24th, 2026.
f3f8bb58317f193a5cc18b26bcc58378.full_text:
When was the last time you laughed so totally that thinking disappeared? 🌩️

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

🗓️ September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "ROSE" to explore the course and reserve your place.

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

#meditation #osho #awareness #mysticrose #meditativetherapy #laughter #silence #oshoo

86e548b05d0142964df624fc3240c65f.full_text:
Your meditation journey does not have to look perfect. 🌿

It can begin exactly where you are:
tired, curious, overwhelmed, open, resistant, longing for something deeper.

Sometimes saying yes is enough.

👉🏻 Write "OIO" in the comments and receive the link of the upcoming live online courses 🗓️
👉🏻 Explore the meditation journey that supports you now ✨

OSHO International Online offers live courses exploring awareness through movement, breath, emotional release, relaxation, intimacy, self-hypnosis, and meditation — all guided in a practical and grounded way.

#meditation #osho #awareness #innerjourney 🌿✨

94d6b79df8b540ee4bc62a878ecadd28.title: OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind
94d6b79df8b540ee4bc62a878ecadd28.description: Live online course exploring practical meditation methods to create space between you and thoughts for presence.
94d6b79df8b540ee4bc62a878ecadd28.full_text:
Be here, not there 🌿

The mind is constantly pulling attention somewhere else:
later, earlier, elsewhere.

OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind is a live online course exploring simple and practical meditation methods that create space between you and your thoughts — so presence becomes something felt, not forced.

A playful exploration of four ways to find the mind's off switch ✨

🗓️ May 18th – May 22nd, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 13th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "QUIET" in the comments, and get the invitation to the course in your DMs!

"As you become skillful, as you learn the knack of not getting involved in the mind, as you learn the art of remaining aloof, away from the mind, as you learn the science of creating a distance between you and your own thoughts, more and more meditation will be showering on you" Osho, Philosophia Perennis, Series 2, 5

07a86d02e7731abcddf27df7357945f6.title: OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation
07a86d02e7731abcddf27df7357945f6.description: Live online course exploring self-hypnosis for meditation. Works gently with the unconscious through guided self-hypnosis, relaxation, and awareness. Optional Facilitator Training available.
07a86d02e7731abcddf27df7357945f6.full_text:
OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation explores a different approach: working gently with the unconscious instead of against yourself. Through guided self-hypnosis, relaxation, and awareness, this live online course supports meditation in a more natural way ✨

Optional Facilitator Training also available.

👉🏻 Write "HYPNOSIS" to explore the course and book your FREE Preview!!

🗓️ May 26th – June 1st, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 19th, 2026

"The day you can hypnotize yourself is a great day; something valuable has been achieved. Then you can do miracles with it, upon yourself. You can change things that you have always been trying to change; but the more you try to change them, the more difficult it becomes." Osho, The Dhammapada: The Way of the Buddha, Vol. 5, 2

#meditation #osho #awareness #selfhypnosis #meditationpractice #innerwork #consciousliving #oshoonline

5bd7c659c92d13fbd2a31e10c9398923.title: OSHO Exploring the Chakras
5bd7c659c92d13fbd2a31e10c9398923.description: Experiential weekend course exploring seven energy centers through meditation and direct experience. Learn how chakras connect to feelings, relationships, expression, and movement through life.
5bd7c659c92d13fbd2a31e10c9398923.full_text:
If the chakras are meant to flow naturally…
why do we still feel blocked, disconnected, or stuck?

👉🏻 Write "CHAKRA" to explore the course!

OSHO Exploring the Chakras is an experiential weekend course in awareness and inner energy.

Through meditation and direct experience, you explore the seven energy centers of the body — not as abstract concepts, but as living dimensions connected to how you feel, relate, express, and move through life.

🗓️ May 16–17, 2026
LIVE Online Course
Free Preview: May 9, 2026

"All the centers, all the seven chakras of the body, have to function well… My emphasis is to live in all the seven centers together."
Osho, A Sudden Clash of Thunder, 8

#meditation #osho #awareness #chakra
#chakrajourney #energyhealing #consciousliving #innergrowth

b079bbc1f994130953bd309758ff49d4.title: Osho Transformation Meditation Camp
b079bbc1f994130953bd309758ff49d4.description: Three-day meditation camp featuring dynamic meditations, silence, emotional cleansing, celebration, and transformative discourses guided by Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.
b079bbc1f994130953bd309758ff49d4.full_text:
OSHO TRANSFORMATION MEDITATION CAMP
OSHO JEEVAN RUPANTARAN DHYAN SHIVIR
A Three-Day Journey of Meditation, Awareness & Inner Transformation

In the serene and deeply beautiful atmosphere of Osho Upaban, a rare and transformative meditation camp is being lovingly organized under the guidance, presence, and spiritual energy of Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.

This is not simply a meditation program — it is an invitation to move inward, rediscover silence, awaken awareness, and celebrate life in its totality. Surrounded by nature, meditation, and a vibrant energy field of seekers, these three days can become a profound turning point in one's inner journey.

VENUE:
Osho Upaban
Dobilla–17, Pokhara

CAMP DATES:
June 12 – June 14, 2026
(Jestha 29, 30 & 31, 2083)

ARRIVAL & REGISTRATION:
June 11, 2026 (Jestha 28)
From 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM

CAMP INAUGURATION & OPENING MEDITATION SESSION:
Begins from 5:00 PM onwards

FACILITATOR & SPIRITUAL GUIDE:
Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun

BOOKING & INFORMATION:
+977 984-0600056

HIGHLIGHTS OF THE CAMP:
✨ Dynamic & Active Meditations
✨ Deep Silence & Inner Stillness
✨ Emotional Cleansing & Awareness
✨ Celebration, Dance & Joyfulness
✨ Powerful Meditative Energy Field
✨ Transformative Discourses & Guidance
✨ A Loving Community of Seekers

"Meditation is the journey from mind to no-mind, from noise to silence, from personality to presence." — Osho

If your heart longs for peace, clarity, love, and transformation…
If you wish to experience meditation beyond words and concepts…
Then this sacred gathering at Osho Upaban may become an unforgettable doorway toward a new consciousness.

Swami Yoganand

b5d794af5345218478c00957171e4983.title: OSHO Mystic Rose
b5d794af5345218478c00957171e4983.description: 21-day meditative therapy: 7 days laughter, 7 days tears, 7 days silence. 3 hours daily. Open to all participants.
b5d794af5345218478c00957171e4983.full_text:
OSHO Mystic Rose

WHAT IS OSHO MYSTIC ROSE?
Laughter, Tears, and Silence.

For 21 days:
🌹 Laugh for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
🌹 Cry for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
🌹 Sit silently for 3 hours a day, for 7 days

WHEN DOES IT START AND HOW CAN I PARTICIPATE?
OSHO Mystic Rose starts on the 11th of every month at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. Whether you're in the Living-In program or joining from outside the Meditation Resort — the door is open.

More information: https://bit.ly/Join-OSHO-Mystic-Rose

Been through Mystic Rose before? Come back deeper, or simply to refresh. As a gesture of support, returning participants are invited again with a 50% contribution.

"The first thing to be done is laughter, because that sets the trend for the whole day. If you wake up laughing, you will soon begin to feel how absurd life is. Nothing is serious: even your disappointments are laughable, even your pain is laughable, even you are laughable."
— Osho, Vedanta: Seven Steps to Samadhi, #1

crop_hint.note: Group gathering, faces distributed mid-frame, center crop balances composition

37fac84550dbc9c34fc19cdb56f45bad.title: Mystic Rose: 21-Day Meditative Therapy
37fac84550dbc9c34fc19cdb56f45bad.description: 21-day meditative therapy combining laughter, tears, and silence to dissolve emotional scars through total participation and awareness.
37fac84550dbc9c34fc19cdb56f45bad.full_text:
Don't laugh it off — laugh it on!

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

Dates: September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
Format: LIVE Online Course
Duration: 21 days • 3 hours a day
Free Preview: June 24th, 2026

Explore the course and reserve your place: https://bit.ly/OSHO-MysticRose-Sep2026

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does." - Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

crop_hint.note: Rose imagery centered, text balanced top and bottom.

ff749c4d426a82c22938f299211926f0.description: Live online course exploring reconnection with body's natural intelligence and developing a loving relationship with its signals.
ff749c4d426a82c22938f299211926f0.full_text:
Your body is telling you something, are you listening?

"The body will never misguide you, you can trust it, and you can trust it absolutely."
Osho, The Rebellious Spirit, 22 ✨

OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind™ explores how to reconnect with the body's natural intelligence and develop a more loving relationship with its signals.

This live online course supports a deeper understanding of what your body may be communicating — and how to respond with greater sensitivity and trust.

LIVE Online Course • 7 days • 1 hour a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 9th, 2026

5af8b4ad202643106597cf06b54c5c77.description: Meditation camp in the mountains of Kasar Devi, known for its strong geomagnetic field supporting deep meditation practice.
5af8b4ad202643106597cf06b54c5c77.full_text:
Our last retreat for May in Rishikesh was absolutely beautiful 🙏✨✨.

Thank you to all the wonderful participants who came and shared your energy with the group.

We took some of these sessions indoors when the temperature started to soar - to keep our focusing moving towards deep meditation.

So wonderful to meet you all. Life long connections definitely made.

In June we are taking our meditation camp up to Kasar Devi chasing the cooler climate. The mountains also being a special energy, and Kasar itself has an unusually strong geomagnetic field. This supports meditation with such ease.

If you'd like to join us in Kasar Devi, WhatsApp +919058967526.

And if you're wanting to join us in Rishikesh, follow @oshobliss_experiences to stay up to date with when we'll be back.

#osho #ओशो #rishikesh #ध्यानशिविर #activemeditation

0c63674cef341d89d6f5ff1ced546a00.title: Healing Sexual Trauma
0c63674cef341d89d6f5ff1ced546a00.description: Workshop addressing sexual trauma through conscious sexuality practices with awareness, safety, and healing focus.
0c63674cef341d89d6f5ff1ced546a00.full_text:
Healing Sexual Trauma | 25 June - 1 July

Conscius Sexuality workshops at Humaniversity

Over the years, I have met thousands of people who carried a quiet question within themselves: "Why does something so natural feel so complicated?"

Sexuality is one of the most fundamental expressions of being human. It is present long before we understand it intellectually, and it continues to shape our sense of aliveness, confidence, and connection throughout life. And yet, for many people, sexuality is also one of the places where shame, confusion, and pain have settled most deeply.

Consious Sexuality workshops exist because sexuality is rarely given the space it truly needs. Not a space of advice, technique, or performance, but a space of awareness, safety, and honest meetings and communication.

At Humaniversity, sexuality work has been part of our therapeutic approach for decades. We have seen, again and again, that when sexuality is met with respect, awareness and friendship, it becomes a powerful gateway to healing, sovereignty, and joy.

With love, Sambodhi

31e9b39bd7c4ae80c71ee02c347b39aa.title: Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival
31e9b39bd7c4ae80c71ee02c347b39aa.description: Residential spiritual dance festival combining ecstatic dance, music, and meditation for inner awakening and consciousness exploration.
31e9b39bd7c4ae80c71ee02c347b39aa.full_text:
🔥🕉️ NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 💃✨
🌙 Dance Your Way Into Silence…

There are moments when words are not enough… when the heart longs to express, release & celebrate 🌿

Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival is an invitation to move beyond the mind and enter a deeper experience of awareness through dance, music & meditation 🎶🕊️

Here, dance is not about perfection…
It is about freedom.
It is about losing yourself so completely in movement that only presence remains ✨

💫 When the body moves totally, the mind becomes silent…
and meditation begins naturally.

Inspired by the spirit of celebration, devotion & consciousness, this festival creates a sacred space where movement transforms into inner awakening 🔥

🌸 Through ecstatic dance, music, meditation & collective energy, you may experience:

✨ Release of stress & emotional heaviness
✨ Deep relaxation & inner calm
✨ Joy, playfulness & freedom of expression
✨ A stronger connection with yourself & others
✨ Silence, awareness & meditative bliss

Like Shiva Nataraj - the cosmic dancer -
every movement becomes sacred, every breath becomes alive 🌺💃

No matter your age or experience, you are welcome exactly as you are 🌙
You do not need to know dance…

313218e55ffd8a9fab2cafb545947486.title: Circle of Mystical Dances
313218e55ffd8a9fab2cafb545947486.venue: Zorba the Buddha, Osho Mystical Village
313218e55ffd8a9fab2cafb545947486.description: Weekly Thursday evening free-form dance, celebration and deep meditation rooted in Osho's wisdom. 14 transformative conscious dances including Heart Dance, Elemental Dance, Chakra Dance, Sufi Whirling, Ecstatic Dance and more, followed by organic buffet dinner.
313218e55ffd8a9fab2cafb545947486.full_text:
Circle of Mystical Dances

Unlock your true essence every Thursday evening!

Through free-form dance, celebration & deep meditation.
Rooted in Osho's timeless wisdom & yogic flow.
Movement becomes a doorway to silence, bliss & balance.

Explore 1 of 14 transformative conscious dances weekly:

❤️ Heart Dance – Open your heart's wild rhythm!
🔥 Elemental Dance – Channel earth, fire, water, air!
🌀 Chakra Dance – Activate your energy centers.
⏹️ OSHO Gurdjieff Stop Dance – Sudden awareness bursts!
🎨 Creative Movement Therapy – Heal through expression.
🦋 Dance of Evolution – Journey through life's stages!
🌀 Sufi Whirling Primal Dance – Spin into the divine.
🌌 OSHO No-Dimensions – Beyond mind, pure freedom!
🤝 Contact Improvisation – Connect body to body.
🌊 5Rhythms – Flow through stillness, chaos, lyrical!
🙏 Gurdjieff Sacred Dances – Ancient patterns of awakening.
🎉 Ecstatic Dance – Let go & surrender to joy!
☮️ Dances of Universal Peace – Harmony in unity.

At Zorba the Buddha, Osho Mystical Village – a safe haven!
For joyful self-expression & inner exploration.

Sessions start at 7 PM: Mystical dance immersion.
Followed by organic buffet dinner in communal bliss!

No dance experience required – just presence & openness!
Beginners & experts welcome to this sacred circle.

Real Transformations:
"Reconnected with my inner child–pure magic!" – Sameera
"Stunning meditative dances. I live for Thursdays!" – Riya

📅 Every Thursday, 7 PM onwards
📱 Contact: +91 93119 58352
📍 Zorba The Buddha, 7, Tropical Drive, Ghitorni, Mehrauli-Gurgaon Rd, New Delhi-110030

Join our 'Circle of Mystical Dances' WhatsApp group!
Build meaningful bonds with like-minded spiritual souls.

3f168c218f422fd3a4fc81a0936f3cdf.full_text:
Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh

Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. This retreat is a weekend reset for sincere seekers, experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness, or the weight of life's pressures; so they can reconnect to their own inner essence. A familiarity with Osho is a requirement - from reading his books, listening to his discourses or doing his meditation techniques and practices.

Includes:
• Kundalini and active dynamic meditations running through the day in the Buddha Hall and nature based spaces including the Ganga Ghats
• Range of accommodations to suit all budgets with room sharing options and private AC rooms. Starting price is ₹4300 for the 3 days, for dorm bed package.
• 3 satvik meals daily + some drinks included in cost.
• Meditations guided in Hindi and English.

Dates: 7-10th May

Venue: Dhyan Mandir, Lalkadi Ghat, Rishikesh

*(Arrive 4pm first Day, Finish 2pm Last day)

Meet your facilitators:
Dimpal
Christine
Sarju

c39cc6d6f69fe46e4ffc27576f080d6e.title: Osho Meditation Retreat
c39cc6d6f69fe46e4ffc27576f080d6e.description: Three-day meditation retreat at Osho Ashram with meditation sessions, meals, and accommodation. Open to all seekers.
c39cc6d6f69fe46e4ffc27576f080d6e.full_text:
Next retreat 21-24 May 2026.

A review from our latest retreat 🤩

English translation:
"I have come to the Osho Ashram for a three-day retreat. One meditation session has just ended, and another is about to begin. This is our hall where the meditation takes place, and these are all the Swamis and seekers here between sessions.
The main reason I'm making this video is this: for anyone who has misconceptions about what happens at Osho—thinking it's like this or like that—let me clear it up for you.
It's only meditation. You get great sleep and good food. Everyone should come here. If you're already happy and doing well in life, it's not necessary, but I think you should experience everything life has to offer.
There are many Hindus here, people from Gujarat, and many Muslims as well..."

To book the next one - WhatsApp +919058967526. (The only booking number).

d9bf0cd82461df03916dd65e01dca76f.description: Learn intuitive tarot reading through Osho Zen Tarot. Develop intuition, inner clarity, and meditative awareness. Open to seekers, healers, and curious explorers.
d9bf0cd82461df03916dd65e01dca76f.full_text:
OSHO Zen Tarot Reader's Training

Step into a journey beyond prediction… into awareness, intuition & inner clarity.
At the serene space of Zorba the Buddha, immerse yourself in the transformative wisdom of the Osho Zen Tarot.

This is not about telling the future - it's about understanding the present moment deeply

Learn to read the cards as a mirror of consciousness,
decode emotions, patterns & energy blocks,
and guide yourself & others with insight, presence & compassion.

Whether you're a seeker, healer, or simply curious—
this training opens the door to meditation through awareness.

What you'll experience:
• Intuitive card reading techniques
• Deep connection with your inner voice
• Meditative processes & self-exploration
• Real-time practice & guidance

Let the cards become a doorway…
from mind to no-mind, from confusion to clarity.

Venue: Zorba the Buddha, New Delhi
Limited seats | Prior registration required

7e3f30f650a97c828a9d8751f5893885.title: OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis
7e3f30f650a97c828a9d8751f5893885.description: Live online workshop on stress management through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness to develop relaxation and ease with yourself.
7e3f30f650a97c828a9d8751f5893885.full_text:
Are you comfortable just being with yourself? 🌿

Many forms of stress come from the feeling that we always need to do something, solve something, improve something, or move somewhere else.

OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis explores relaxation from another angle: learning how to work gently with the unconscious so the body and mind can return to ease 🌹

Through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness, this live online course supports a more relaxed and natural relationship with yourself — one where rest becomes possible again.

🗓️ June 13th – 14th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • Sat & Sun • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 7th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "STRESS" in the comments.

"Relaxation comes to you when there is no urge for activity; the energy is at home, not moving anywhere. If a certain situation arises you will act, that's all, but you are not finding some excuse to act. You are at ease with yourself. Relaxation is to be at home."

Osho, Tantra: The Supreme Understanding, 4

#meditation #osho #awareness #stressmanagement #selfhypnosis #relaxation #innerwork #oshoonline

7eb1397dc0ff7a350563f512a6857b0e.title: Mystic Rose - 21 Day Meditative Therapy
7eb1397dc0ff7a350563f512a6857b0e.description: 21-day meditative therapy combining laughter, tears, and silence to dissolve emotional patterns through total participation and awareness.
7eb1397dc0ff7a350563f512a6857b0e.full_text:
When was the last time you laughed so totally that thinking disappeared? 🌩️

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

🗓️ September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "ROSE" to explore the course and reserve your place.

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does." - Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

#meditation #osho #awareness #mysticrose #meditativetherapy #laughter #silence #oshoo

94d1af538c25df3b43ace032ee39e014.title: OSHO BodyLove for Women
94d1af538c25df3b43ace032ee39e014.description: Live online course for women to reconnect with their bodies through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry. Free preview on May 30th.
94d1af538c25df3b43ace032ee39e014.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one the world taught you to perform 🌹

"Over time, we can feel cut off from our own bodies… from who we truly are." 
Kimaya

As women, many of us learned to see ourselves through expectations, appearance, and outside opinions. Over time, it can become difficult to feel truly connected to the body — or at ease inside it 🌿

OSHO BodyLove for Women is a live online course created for women who long to feel more relaxed, accepting, and at home in themselves through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry.

A space where self-criticism softens and a more natural connection with yourself begins to grow ✨

🗓️ June 6th & 7th, 2026 
FREE PREVIEW: May 30th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "BODYLOVE" to explore the course.

5d940e42b5b7524bafbe4074e0c17b8b.title: OSHO BodyLove for Women
5d940e42b5b7524bafbe4074e0c17b8b.description: Live online course for women exploring loving and conscious connection with their bodies through feeling, awareness, relaxation, movement, and presence.
5d940e42b5b7524bafbe4074e0c17b8b.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one you see 🌹

So much energy goes into looking at ourselves from the outside.

OSHO BodyLove for Women explores another possibility:
relating to the body through feeling, awareness, relaxation, movement, and presence 🌿

A live online course created for women who want a more loving and conscious connection with themselves — beyond image, performance, or self-judgment.

🗓️ June 6th & 7th, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 30th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "BODYLOVE" in the comments and get the link to explore the course!

"A woman is more capable of going into meditation than a man is. The male energy is aggressive, violent, outgoing, extrovert, and the female energy is introvert, passive, ingoing….

…. It is easier to enter godliness through the body of a woman than through the body of a man."

Osho, The Dhammapada: The Way of the Buddha, Vol. 5, 2

c88252a68d592fcbd7fb83f1fe3c5da5.title: OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind
c88252a68d592fcbd7fb83f1fe3c5da5.description: Live online course exploring practical meditation methods to create space between thoughts and presence.
c88252a68d592fcbd7fb83f1fe3c5da5.full_text:
Be here, not there 🌿

The mind is constantly pulling attention somewhere else: later, earlier, elsewhere.

OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind is a live online course exploring simple and practical meditation methods that create space between you and your thoughts — so presence becomes something felt, not forced.

A playful exploration of four ways to find the mind's off switch ✨

Dates: May 18th – May 22nd, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 13th, 2026

To explore the course, write "QUIET" in the comments and get the invitation to the course in your DMs!

Osho Quote: "As you become skillful, as you learn the knack of not getting involved in the mind, as you learn the art of remaining aloof, away from the mind, as you learn the science of creating a distance between you and your own thoughts, more and more meditation will be showering on you" - Osho, Philosophia Perennis, Series 2, 5

#meditation #osho #awareness #mindfulness #meditationpractice #presence #innerpeace #consciousliving

This live online course supports a deeper understanding of what your body may be communicating — and how to respond with greater sensitivity and trust.

🗓️ June 16th – 22nd, 2026

👉🏻 Write BODY in the comments and receive the details via DM

"The body will never misguide you, you can trust it, and you can trust it absolutely."
Osho, The Rebellious Spirit, 22

#meditation #osho #awareness #bodymind #embodiedawareness #selfhealing #innerwisdom

604d6ef20d4d7ef58407c976ab2fce45.description: Experiential weekend course exploring seven energy centers through meditation and direct experience of inner awareness.
604d6ef20d4d7ef58407c976ab2fce45.full_text:
If the chakras are meant to flow naturally… why do we still feel blocked, disconnected, or stuck?

👉🏻 Write "CHAKRA" to explore the course!

OSHO Exploring the Chakras is an experiential weekend course in awareness and inner energy.

Through meditation and direct experience, you explore the seven energy centers of the body — not as abstract concepts, but as living dimensions connected to how you feel, relate, express, and move through life.

🗓️ May 16–17, 2026
LIVE Online Course
Free Preview: May 9, 2026

"All the centers, all the seven chakras of the body, have to function well… My emphasis is to live in all the seven centers together."
Osho, A Sudden Clash of Thunder, 8

#meditation #osho #awareness #chakra #chakrajourney #energyhealing #consciousliving #innergrowth

Bring the suppressed up to BE EXPRESSED 🌩️

Your anger.
Your laughter.
Your sadness.
Your tears.
Back to life 🌿

OSHO Active Meditations In-Depth is a live online course exploring the science, structure, and transformative power behind OSHO Active Meditations.

A 7-day immersive exploration with meditation, understanding, and direct experience ✨

🗓️ June 9th – June 15th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 1.5 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 2nd, 2026

👉🏻 Write "DEPTH" to explore the course.

"This is what the active meditation is doing: bringing the suppressed up to be expressed; bringing your tears back to life, bringing your anger, your laughter, your sadness, back to life; throwing everything out of your system so that your system becomes purified, so that your system becomes innocent again."

Osho, The Supreme Doctrine, 3

33a227b8673dc4ebcbe9ebbd36a951af.title: Osho Transformation Meditation Camp (Osho Jeevan Rupantaran Dhyan Shivir)
33a227b8673dc4ebcbe9ebbd36a951af.description: Three-day meditation camp featuring dynamic meditations, silence practices, emotional cleansing, celebration, and transformative discourses under guidance of Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.
33a227b8673dc4ebcbe9ebbd36a951af.full_text:
OSHO TRANSFORMATION MEDITATION CAMP
OSHO JEEVAN RUPANTARAN DHYAN SHIVIR

A Three-Day Journey of Meditation, Awareness & Inner Transformation

In the serene and deeply beautiful atmosphere of Osho Upaban, a rare and transformative meditation camp is being lovingly organized under the guidance, presence, and spiritual energy of Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.

This is not simply a meditation program — it is an invitation to move inward, rediscover silence, awaken awareness, and celebrate life in its totality. Surrounded by nature, meditation, and a vibrant energy field of seekers, these three days can become a profound turning point in one's inner journey.

VENUE:
Osho Upaban
Dobilla–17, Pokhara

CAMP DATES:
June 12 – June 14, 2026
(Jestha 29, 30 & 31, 2083)

ARRIVAL & REGISTRATION:
June 11, 2026 (Jestha 28)
From 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM

CAMP INAUGURATION & OPENING MEDITATION SESSION:
Begins from 5:00 PM onwards

FACILITATOR & SPIRITUAL GUIDE:
Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun

BOOKING & INFORMATION:
+977 984-0600056

HIGHLIGHTS OF THE CAMP:
✨ Dynamic & Active Meditations
✨ Deep Silence & Inner Stillness
✨ Emotional Cleansing & Awareness
✨ Celebration, Dance & Joyfulness
✨ Powerful Meditative Energy Field
✨ Transformative Discourses & Guidance
✨ A Loving Community of Seekers

"Meditation is the journey from mind to no-mind, from noise to silence, from personality to presence." — Osho

If your heart longs for peace, clarity, love, and transformation… If you wish to experience meditation beyond words and concepts… Then this sacred gathering at Osho Upaban may become an unforgettable doorway toward a new consciousness.

Organizer: Swami Yoganand

3f7465d6aefe6949cd4e16b01a7ce6a9.title: Osho Mystic Rose
3f7465d6aefe6949cd4e16b01a7ce6a9.description: 21-day meditative therapy featuring laughter, tears, and silence to dissolve emotional scars through total participation and awareness.
3f7465d6aefe6949cd4e16b01a7ce6a9.full_text:
Don't laugh it off — laugh it on!

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹

Your body is telling you something, are you listening?

"The body will never misguide you, you can trust it, and you can trust it absolutely."
Osho, The Rebellious Spirit, 22 ✨

OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind™ explores how to reconnect with the body's natural intelligence and develop a more loving relationship with its signals.

This live online course supports a deeper understanding of what your body may be communicating — and how to respond with greater sensitivity and trust.

d07ab04ecc20517280c02f54cc1fbe03.full_text:
Our last retreat for May in Rishikesh was absolutely beautiful 🙏✨✨.

Thank you to all the wonderful participants who came and shared your energy with the group.

We took some of these sessions indoors when the temperature started to soar - to keep our focusing moving towards deep meditation.

So wonderful to meet you all. Life long connections definitely made.

In June we are taking our meditation camp up to Kasar Devi chasing the cooler climate. The mountains also being a special energy, and Kasar itself has an unusually strong geomagnetic field. This supports meditation with such ease.

If you'd like to join us in Kasar Devi, WhatsApp +919058967526.

And if you're wanting to join us in Rishikesh, follow @oshobliss_experiences to stay up to date with when we'll be back.

a474336a565f483b974c5e7542691583.title: Osho Luxury Meditation Retreat at Kasar Devi
a474336a565f483b974c5e7542691583.description: 3-day luxury Osho active meditation retreat in the cosmic energy zone of Kasar Devi. Daily active meditations in a sacred consciousness space.
a474336a565f483b974c5e7542691583.full_text:
18th - 21st June 2026

WhatsApp: +919058967526

We are guiding a 3 day luxury Osho meditation retreat in the sacred cosmic energy zone of Kasar Devi.

Stay in Almora's finest luxury resort, which in itself is an architectural delight. With Osho Active Meditations running throughout, daily.

Come, enjoy your comfort, while playing in this highly conscious energy zone (recognized in only 3 places in the world - the other 2 spots being Macchu Pichu and Stone Henge.)

This retreat is for people who are familiar with Osho and are interested in his active meditations (the original somatic therapy) or would like to learn.

Also, please note - our retreats and camps are safe spaces and your wellbeing is our highest priority - we have kicked people off our retreats for unwanted inappropriate behaviour before. If you have sexy ideas about Osho outside meditation, relaxation and awareness - we are not the place for you.

But if you are into going deep in this special energy zone - do yourself a favor and make sure you come!

a6b0ac5043ad330f63ce5f4ae08648bb.title: May 2026 Rishikesh Meditation Camp
a6b0ac5043ad330f63ce5f4ae08648bb.description: Osho meditation retreat in Rishikesh led by facilitators Christine and Sarju, offering meditation and breathwork practices.
a6b0ac5043ad330f63ce5f4ae08648bb.full_text:
Meet your facilitators for the May 2026 Rishikesh meditation camp

Christine:
Born in Australia, Christine has been on the path of inner exploration since 2008 when she began learning meditation at the London Buddhist Centre.
Previously working as a Humanities teacher up to management level, she realized that the best way to bring change to the world is to start from within oneself - so in 2021 she redirected her career towards conscious and spiritual work. She is trained in Osho meditation and other breathwork practices; and for the past 5 years has facilitated meditation and breathwork in London (UK), Australia, India, Osho International Meditation Resort (Pune), as well as online.
In the UK she has shared her work ranging from psychiatric hospitals to schools for children with criminal tendencies, corporate wellness and community relaxation sessions. Christine provides a safe space for emotional release, connecting with one's true nature and experimenting with consciousness, so that individuals can become more empowered by knowing themselves and existence.

Sarju:
Born in Gujarat (India) and an Osho sannyasin since 2008.
Previously he ran an oil mill and tire plant as an entrepreneur, and also worked in construction management in London.
While running his business in India, he frequently stayed for extended periods at Osho ashrams in Madhavpur, Mehsana and Pune, where he had the opportunity to dive deeply within himself. During his exploration of 'Zorba the Buddha', he learned the great value of Zen discipline and incorporates this principle into his work to help others discover and know their own truth.
Sarju began informally teaching friends breathing techniques and practices, which in 2022 turned into facilitating Osho meditation. He has conducted numerous intensive and personal sessions in London, Osho International Meditation Resort in Pune and throughout India.

#meditationcamp #osho #oshomeditation #osho #rishikesh

0ae6a8b7d74d6c92e1efc58ccbd89356.title: Healing Sexual Trauma
0ae6a8b7d74d6c92e1efc58ccbd89356.description: Workshop on healing sexual trauma through conscious sexuality work at Humaniversity, creating space for awareness, safety, and honest communication.
0ae6a8b7d74d6c92e1efc58ccbd89356.full_text:
Healing Sexual Trauma | 25 June - 1 July

Consious Sexuality workshops at Humaniversity

Over the years, I have met thousands of people who carried a quiet question within themselves: "Why does something so natural feel so complicated?"

Sexuality is one of the most fundamental expressions of being human. It is present long before we understand it intellectually, and it continues to shape our sense of aliveness, confidence, and connection throughout life. And yet, for many people, sexuality is also one of the places where shame, confusion, and pain have settled most deeply.

Consious Sexuality workshops exist because sexuality is rarely given the space it truly needs. Not a space of advice, technique, or performance, but a space of awareness, safety, and honest meetings and communication.

At Humaniversity, sexuality work has been part of our therapeutic approach for decades. We have seen, again and again, that when sexuality is met with respect, awareness and friendship, it becomes a powerful gateway to healing, sovereignty, and joy.

With love,
Sambodhi

915172d28685454d74756aa669fdeb3b.title: Mystic Rose
915172d28685454d74756aa669fdeb3b.description: 21-day meditative therapy using laughter, tears, and silence to dissolve emotional scars through total participation and awareness.
915172d28685454d74756aa669fdeb3b.full_text:
When was the last time you laughed so totally that thinking disappeared? 🌩️

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

🗓️ September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "ROSE" to explore the course and reserve your place.

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

4b2cf243f47d7f3cde012ce779dfbb4e.title: OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis
4b2cf243f47d7f3cde012ce779dfbb4e.description: Live online course exploring relaxation through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness to develop a relaxed relationship with yourself.
4b2cf243f47d7f3cde012ce779dfbb4e.full_text:
Are you comfortable just being with yourself? 🌿

Many forms of stress come from the feeling that we always need to do something, solve something, improve something, or move somewhere else.

OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis explores relaxation from another angle: learning how to work gently with the unconscious so the body and mind can return to ease 🌹

Through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness, this live online course supports a more relaxed and natural relationship with yourself — one where rest becomes possible again.

🗓️ June 13th – 14th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • Sat & Sun • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 7th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "STRESS" in the comments.

"Relaxation comes to you when there is no urge for activity; the energy is at home, not moving anywhere. If a certain situation arises you will act, that's all, but you are not finding some excuse to act. You are at ease with yourself. Relaxation is to be at home."

Osho, Tantra: The Supreme Understanding, 4

#meditation #osho #awareness #stressmanagement #selfhypnosis #relaxation #innerwork #oshoonline

07001704a88420fc816609207a9a158d.title: Sound Healing & Voice Opening Retreat
07001704a88420fc816609207a9a158d.description: 4-day immersive journey of emotional release, sacred sound healing, breath & voice activation, meditation and reconnecting with authentic self.
07001704a88420fc816609207a9a158d.full_text:
✨ What if healing isn't about "fixing" yourself… but about returning to your natural frequency? 🎶

You carry more than thoughts inside you…
You carry unspoken emotions, suppressed energy & silent exhaustion. 🌙

And sometimes…
talking doesn't heal.
✨ Sound does.

Because sound moves where words cannot.
It travels through the body… softening stress, opening emotions & calming the nervous system. 🤍

A vibration can release heaviness.
A chant can awaken silence.
A voice can become medicine.

🌿 Sound Healing & Voice Opening Retreat
📅 04th – 08th June 2026
📍 Zorba The Buddha
📞 93119 58352

🌌 A 4-day immersive journey of:
✨ Emotional Release
✨ Sacred Sound Healing
✨ Breath & Voice Activation
✨ Meditation & Inner Silence
✨ Reconnecting with your authentic self

🎵 This isn't a music class…
It's a remembrance.

Of the voice you silenced.
Of the peace you've been searching for.
Of the rhythm your soul already knows. 🌿

✨ Come as you are…
and leave lighter, open & alive.

📩 DM to reserve your space

003fbec270de2ca7338ebf64719994e9.title: Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival
003fbec270de2ca7338ebf64719994e9.description: Ecstatic dance, music and meditation festival for spiritual awakening through movement and collective energy celebration.
003fbec270de2ca7338ebf64719994e9.full_text:
NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL
🌙 Dance Your Way Into Silence…

There are moments when words are not enough…
when the heart longs to express, release & celebrate

Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival is an invitation to move beyond the mind and enter a deeper experience of awareness through dance, music & meditation

Here, dance is not about perfection…
It is about freedom.
It is about losing yourself so completely in movement that only presence remains

When the body moves totally,
the mind becomes silent…
and meditation begins naturally.

Inspired by the spirit of celebration, devotion & consciousness, this festival creates a sacred space where movement transforms into inner awakening

Through ecstatic dance, music, meditation & collective energy, you may experience:
- Release of stress & emotional heaviness
- Deep relaxation & inner calm
- Joy, playfulness & freedom of expression
- A stronger connection with yourself & others
- Silence, awareness & meditative bliss

Like Shiva Nataraj - the cosmic dancer -
every movement becomes sacred, every breath becomes alive

No matter your age or experience, you are welcome exactly as you are
You do not need to know dance…
your soul already understands the rhythm

Open for both Women & Men
Celebrate • Dance • Meditate • Transform

Location: Zorba The Buddha
Dates: 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival
Contact: +91 93119 58352

Come as you are…
Leave lighter, freer & more connected to your inner self

At Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival, Dance becomes Meditation… and Celebration becomes a Path to the Divine.

95e7922f6367abee0aa2143fac2f982b.description: 7-day immersive live online exploration of OSHO Active Meditations covering science, structure, and transformative power with daily practice.
95e7922f6367abee0aa2143fac2f982b.full_text:
Bring the suppressed up to BE EXPRESSED 🌩️

Your anger.
Your laughter.
Your sadness.
Your tears.
Back to life 🌿

OSHO Active Meditations In-Depth is a live online course exploring the science, structure, and transformative power behind OSHO Active Meditations.

A 7-day immersive exploration with meditation, understanding, and direct experience ✨

🗓️ June 9th – June 15th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 1.5 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 2nd, 2026

👉🏻 Write "DEPTH" to explore the course.

"This is what the active meditation is doing: bringing the suppressed up to be expressed; bringing your tears back to life, bringing your anger, your laughter, your sadness, back to life; throwing everything out of your system so that your system becomes purified, so that your system becomes innocent again."

Osho, The Supreme Doctrine, 3

41d2f722a4e4d4f3c1fd6525f5a6d1c5.title: OSHO BodyLove for Women
41d2f722a4e4d4f3c1fd6525f5a6d1c5.description: Live online course for women to reconnect with their bodies through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry.
41d2f722a4e4d4f3c1fd6525f5a6d1c5.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one the world taught you to perform 🌹

"Over time, we can feel cut off from our own bodies… from who we truly are." 
Kimaya

As women, many of us learned to see ourselves through expectations, appearance, and outside opinions. Over time, it can become difficult to feel truly connected to the body — or at ease inside it 🌿

OSHO BodyLove for Women is a live online course created for women who long to feel more relaxed, accepting, and at home in themselves through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry.

A space where self-criticism softens and a more natural connection with yourself begins to grow ✨

Dates: June 6th & 7th, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 30th, 2026

To explore the course, write "BODYLOVE"

77f45a2f128136d833029d37d9f84b12.title: Osho Meditation Retreat
77f45a2f128136d833029d37d9f84b12.description: Three-day meditation retreat with meditation sessions, accommodation, and meals included. All seekers welcome.
77f45a2f128136d833029d37d9f84b12.full_text:
Next retreat 21-24 May 2026.

A review from our latest retreat 🤩

I have come to the Osho Ashram for a three-day retreat. One meditation session has just ended, and another is about to begin. This is our hall where the meditation takes place, and these are all the Swamis and seekers here between sessions.

The main reason I'm making this video is this: for anyone who has misconceptions about what happens at Osho—thinking it's like this or like that—let me clear it up for you.

It's only meditation. You get great sleep and good food. Everyone should come here. If you're already happy and doing well in life, it's not necessary, but I think you should experience everything life has to offer.

There are many Hindus here, people from Gujarat, and many Muslims as well...

To book the next one - WhatsApp +919058967526. (The only booking number).

#oshobliss #meditationcamp #osho #retreat rishikesh

03ba21904c768a47a46e6a948ddc8453.title: Osho Zen Tarot Reader's Training
03ba21904c768a47a46e6a948ddc8453.description: Learn intuitive tarot reading techniques, meditative processes, and self-exploration through Osho Zen Tarot wisdom. Open the door to meditation through awareness.
03ba21904c768a47a46e6a948ddc8453.full_text:
🌙✨ OSHO Zen Tarot Reader's Training ✨🌙

Step into a journey beyond prediction… into awareness, intuition & inner clarity.
At the serene space of Zorba the Buddha, immerse yourself in the transformative wisdom of the Osho Zen Tarot.

This is not about telling the future - 
it's about understanding the present moment deeply🌀

Learn to read the cards as a mirror of consciousness,
decode emotions, patterns & energy blocks,
and guide yourself & others with insight, presence & compassion. 🌿🔮

Whether you're a seeker, healer, or simply curious—
this training opens the door to meditation through awareness. 🕉️

✨ What you'll experience:
• Intuitive card reading techniques
• Deep connection with your inner voice
• Meditative processes & self-exploration
• Real-time practice & guidance

Let the cards become a doorway…
from mind to no-mind, from confusion to clarity. 🌌

📍 Venue: Zorba the Buddha, New Delhi
📩 Limited seats | Prior registration required

#OshoZenTarot #TarotTraining #OshoMeditation #ZorbaTheBuddha #SpiritualGrowth✨

5e43532ce97b41ccaa6e5d84d248c1e5.venue: Zorba The Buddha, 7, Tropical Drive, Ghitorni, Mehrauli-Gurgaon Rd

5e43532ce97b41ccaa6e5d84d248c1e5.description: Weekly conscious dance gathering rooted in Osho wisdom. 14 transformative dances including Heart Dance, Elemental Dance, Chakra Dance, Sufi Whirling, Ecstatic Dance & more. Sessions with meditation & organic dinner.
5e43532ce97b41ccaa6e5d84d248c1e5.full_text:
🌙✨ Circle of Mystical Dances ✨🌙

Unlock your true essence every Thursday evening!

Through free-form dance, celebration & deep meditation.

Rooted in Osho's timeless wisdom & yogic flow.
Movement becomes a doorway to silence, bliss & balance. 🕉️🌌

Explore 1 of 14 transformative conscious dances weekly:

❤️ Heart Dance – Open your heart's wild rhythm!
🔥 Elemental Dance – Channel earth, fire, water, air!
🌀 Chakra Dance – Activate your energy centers.
⏹️ OSHO Gurdjieff Stop Dance – Sudden awareness bursts!
🎨 Creative Movement Therapy – Heal through expression.
🦋 Dance of Evolution – Journey through life's stages!
🌀 Sufi Whirling Primal Dance – Spin into the divine.
🌌 OSHO No-Dimensions – Beyond mind, pure freedom!
🤝 Contact Improvisation – Connect body to body.
🌊 5Rhythms – Flow through stillness, chaos, lyrical!
🙏 Gurdjieff Sacred Dances – Ancient patterns of awakening.
🎉 Ecstatic Dance – Let go & surrender to joy!
☮️ Dances of Universal Peace – Harmony in unity.

At Zorba the Buddha, Osho Mystical Village – a safe haven!
For joyful self-expression & inner exploration. 🏰🙌

Sessions start at 7 PM: Mystical dance immersion.
Followed by organic buffet dinner in communal bliss! 🍲🌿

No dance experience required – just presence & openness!
Beginners & experts welcome to this sacred circle. 💖✨

Real Transformations:
"Reconnected with my inner child–pure magic!" – Sameera
"Stunning meditative dances. I live for Thursdays!" – Riya ❤️

📅 Every Thursday, 7 PM onwards
📱 Contact: +91 93119 58352
📍 Zorba The Buddha, 7, Tropical Drive, Ghitorni, Mehrauli-Gurgaon Rd, New Delhi-110030

Join our 'Circle of Mystical Dances' WhatsApp group!
Build meaningful bonds with like-minded spiritual souls. 👥🕉️💫
