c5fcdd6871fa94dc65397a4dbe68fd28.title: Shamanic Healing Retreat
c5fcdd6871fa94dc65397a4dbe68fd28.description: Four-day retreat featuring Kambh, Sananga, Sweat Lodge, Forest Bathing, and Osho Kundalini Meditation in nature.
c5fcdd6871fa94dc65397a4dbe68fd28.full_text:
SHAMANIC HEALING RETREAT

27–30 August, 2026
📍 Zorba the Buddha, Delhi

✨ Your body is constantly speaking.
Sometimes through vitality.
Sometimes through exhaustion.

When life becomes crowded with stress, noise, emotional weight, and endless doing, the body often asks for something simple:

Space.

🌿 Space to release.
🌿 Space to listen.
🌿 Space to reconnect.

For four days, we gather in nature to explore ancient cleansing practices, meditation, silence, movement, and community.

🍁 The journey includes:

🐸 Kambh
👁️ Sananga
🔥 Sweat Lodge
🌳 Forest Bathing
⚡ Osho Kundalini Meditation

Each offering invites a different kind of cleansing—physical, emotional, energetic, and spiritual.

☘️ Participants often describe:
• Feeling lighter
• Greater clarity
• Renewed energy
• Deeper connection with themselves
• A sense of inner calm and balance

💬
"After participating in Shamanic Plant Medicine ceremonies, I feel more peaceful in my mind and stable in my health. It has also helped me control my weight naturally."
- Antas

🌿 In the heart of nature, surrounded by trees, birdsong, and conscious community, this retreat becomes an opportunity to step away from the familiar and remember what it feels like to simply be.

Zorba the Buddha • Delhi

#ShamanicHealing #HealingRetreat #ConsciousLiving #MeditationRetreat #ForestBathing

da697296edc3e55a6b1dfb15de2d311f.title: Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh
da697296edc3e55a6b1dfb15de2d311f.description: Weekend reset with active meditations for energetic realignment. Kundalini and dynamic meditations, satvik meals, nature-based spaces including Ganga Ghats.
da697296edc3e55a6b1dfb15de2d311f.full_text:
Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh

Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. This retreat is a weekend reset for sincere seekers, experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness, or the weight of life's pressures; so they can reconnect to their own inner essence. A familiarity with Osho is a requirement - from reading his books, listening to his discourses or doing his meditation techniques and practices.

Includes:
• Kundalini and active dynamic meditations running through the day in the Buddha Hall and nature based spaces including the Ganga Ghats
• Range of accommodations to suit all budgets with room sharing options and private AC rooms. Starting price is ₹4300 for the 3 days, for dorm bed package.
• 3 satvik meals daily + some drinks included in cost.
• Meditations guided in Hindi and English.

Dates: 7 - 10th May
Venue: Dhyan Mandir, Lalkadi Ghat, Rishikesh
*(Arrive 4pm first Day, Finish 2pm Last day)

For more info or bookings:
+919898346475
@thetempleofbliss
@oshobliss28

Facilitators: Dimpal, Christine, Sarju

13f9f747382577d6ad6e4faf3514abc5.full_text:
🔥🕉️ NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 💃✨

🌙 What if dance could become your meditation…?

There comes a moment when the soul no longer wants to think…
it simply wants to feel, move & celebrate 🌿✨

💫 Step into a sacred space where:
🎶 Music becomes prayer
💃 Movement becomes freedom
🕊️ Silence becomes your inner home

At Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival, dance is not performance…
it is pure presence 🔥

When the body moves totally,
the mind slowly melts into stillness…
and meditation begins naturally 🌸

✨ Experience:
🌺 Ecstatic Dance & Celebration
🌙 Deep Meditation & Inner Silence
🔥 Emotional Release & Healing
💫 Joy, Freedom & Self-Expression
🕉️ A Deeper Connection with Yourself & Others

Like Shiva Nataraj — the cosmic dancer —
every step becomes sacred… every breath becomes alive 🌺💃

❤️ No dance experience needed
🌿 Open for Women & Men
✨ Just bring your energy, your openness & your heart

🎶 Dance • Celebrate • Meditate • Transform

📍 Zorba The Buddha
📅 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival
📞 93119 58352 | 98108 06501

💫 Come as you are…
Leave lighter, freer & deeply connected to your inner self 🕊️✨

4d4429a12c0458e5e4e06fcec0eaaf88.description: Live online course exploring practical meditation methods to create space between thoughts and presence.
4d4429a12c0458e5e4e06fcec0eaaf88.full_text:
Be here, not there 🌿

The mind is constantly pulling attention somewhere else: later, earlier, elsewhere.

OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind is a live online course exploring simple and practical meditation methods that create space between you and your thoughts — so presence becomes something felt, not forced.

A playful exploration of four ways to find the mind's off switch ✨

🗓️ May 18th – May 22nd, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 13th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "QUIET" in the comments, and get the invitation to the course in your DMs!

"As you become skillful, as you learn the knack of not getting involved in the mind, as you learn the art of remaining aloof, away from the mind, as you learn the science of creating a distance between you and your own thoughts, more and more meditation will be showering on you" Osho, Philosophia Perennis, Series 2, 5

#meditation #osho #awareness #mindfulness #meditationpractice #presence #innerpeace #consciousliving

A live online course created for women who want a more loving and conscious connection with themselves — beyond image, performance, or self-judgment.

"A woman is more capable of going into meditation than a man is. The male energy is aggressive, violent, outgoing, extrovert, and the female energy is introvert, passive, ingoing….

…. It is easier to enter godliness through the body of a woman than through the body of a man."

Osho, The Dhammapada: The Way of the Buddha, Vol. 5, 2

57f5bd742299821e8d9757ef44b2c48a.description: Live online course exploring reconnection with body's natural intelligence and conscious relationship with its signals over 7 days, 1 hour daily.
57f5bd742299821e8d9757ef44b2c48a.full_text:
OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind™ explores how to reconnect with the body's natural intelligence and develop a more conscious relationship with its signals 🌹

This live online course supports a deeper understanding of what your body may be communicating — and how to respond with greater sensitivity and trust.

🗓️ June 16th – 22nd, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 7 days • 1 hour a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 9th, 2026

👉🏻 Write BODY in the comments and receive the details via DM

"The body will never misguide you, you can trust it, and you can trust it absolutely."
Osho, The Rebellious Spirit, 22

#meditation #osho #awareness #bodymind #embodiedawareness #selfhealing #innerwisdom

23eceb326b00a2480986b06690f6ee82.title: OSHO Exploring the Chakras
23eceb326b00a2480986b06690f6ee82.description: Experiential weekend course exploring seven energy centers through meditation and direct experience of inner awareness.
23eceb326b00a2480986b06690f6ee82.full_text:
If the chakras are meant to flow naturally… why do we still feel blocked, disconnected, or stuck?

OSHO Exploring the Chakras is an experiential weekend course in awareness and inner energy.

Through meditation and direct experience, you explore the seven energy centers of the body — not as abstract concepts, but as living dimensions connected to how you feel, relate, express, and move through life.

📅 May 16–17, 2026
LIVE Online Course
Free Preview: May 9, 2026

"All the centers, all the seven chakras of the body, have to function well… My emphasis is to live in all the seven centers together."
Osho, A Sudden Clash of Thunder, 8

59b651d011ff59be5a7d067fcaf9ad5e.description: 5-day silent meditation retreat with Ma Dhyan Abha. Daily sunrise meditation, satsang, silent sitting, Bardo, Zazen, and music to deepen inner experience.
59b651d011ff59be5a7d067fcaf9ad5e.full_text:
ओशो Silence Retreat (5 days)
21 - 25 Oct, 2026
(Opening - 20th Oct, evening)
With: Ma Dhyan Abha

"Silence is the soul of meditation..."

Osho has said this many times, and not only Osho, every guru has emphasized this...

This Osho silence retreat will give us the experience of how!
These 5 days will be of silence in Osho Sanzen. Silence that arises naturally is fruitful, in which the seeker does not have to go through struggle.

Morning sunrise meditation, satsang, silent sitting, Bardo, Zazen, and pleasant music will help seekers go deeper with each passing day.
Every evening satsang, Osho's energy will shower upon all of us. This is an advance group.

If you want to experience yourself closely, you are welcome:

42f8c68777400d72cfe736a2fae23107.title: Osho Transformation Meditation Camp
42f8c68777400d72cfe736a2fae23107.description: Three-day meditation camp with dynamic meditations, silence sessions, emotional cleansing, discourses, and celebration under guidance of Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.
42f8c68777400d72cfe736a2fae23107.full_text:
OSHO JEEVAN RUPANTARAN DHYAN SHIVIR
Osho Transformation Meditation Camp

A Three-Day Journey of Meditation, Awareness & Inner Transformation

In the serene and deeply beautiful atmosphere of Osho Upaban, a rare and transformative meditation camp is being lovingly organized under the guidance, presence, and spiritual energy of Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.

This is not simply a meditation program — it is an invitation to move inward, rediscover silence, awaken awareness, and celebrate life in its totality. Surrounded by nature, meditation, and a vibrant energy field of seekers, these three days can become a profound turning point in one's inner journey.

VENUE:
Osho Upaban
Dobilla–17, Pokhara

CAMP DATES:
June 12 – June 14, 2026
(Jestha 29, 30 & 31, 2083)

ARRIVAL & REGISTRATION:
June 11, 2026 (Jestha 28)
From 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM

CAMP INAUGURATION & OPENING MEDITATION SESSION:
Begins from 5:00 PM onwards

FACILITATOR & SPIRITUAL GUIDE:
Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun

BOOKING & INFORMATION:
+977 984-0600056

HIGHLIGHTS OF THE CAMP:
✨ Dynamic & Active Meditations
✨ Deep Silence & Inner Stillness
✨ Emotional Cleansing & Awareness
✨ Celebration, Dance & Joyfulness

d0fd395f37e991fbdee4ffc0577b5e25.title: Beyond Physical Sight: Activating Your Clairvoyant Power
d0fd395f37e991fbdee4ffc0577b5e25.description: Free nationwide seminar exploring clairvoyant power, Akashic Records, intuition awakening, and life purpose through mystical insights.
d0fd395f37e991fbdee4ffc0577b5e25.full_text:
Ready to awaken your inner vision and discover deeper truths about your life?

Join our FREE simultaneous nationwide seminar (MAKATI-MANILA-PASAY-PARANAQUE), "Beyond Physical Sight: Activating Your Clairvoyant Power" on June 27, 2026 (Saturday), from 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM. Step Into the Akashic Records to Unlock Life's Deepest Secrets. Explore powerful insights, awaken your intuition, and gain a fresh perspective on life, purpose, and possibility. Whether you are curious, seeking clarity, or longing for deeper understanding, this inspiring event offers a meaningful and uplifting experience for all.

Venue: For Makati, Manila, Pasay, or Paranaque, it will be an ONLINE Seminar via Messenger Chatroom. The Messenger link will be provided to registered attendees.

To register for FREE, text your name to (0915) 566.1742 or (0991) 258.7120. Confirmation will be sent after registration.

Admission is free—bring a friend, relative, or colleague and share this inspiring experience together.

Reserve your spot today and be part of an uplifting afternoon of insight, discovery, and personal awakening. We'd love to welcome you!

For the latest updates on upcoming seminars, intensive meditation sessions, and inspirational content, be sure to like and follow our Facebook Page, Rosicrucians.RKMR.Org, and follow us on Instagram @rosicrucianrkmrorg.

#mysticism #rosicrucian #meditation #powerofthemind #metaphysics #philosophy

6907e85c3bc8caec12bf9b490d5345af.title: OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind™
6907e85c3bc8caec12bf9b490d5345af.description: Live online course exploring reconnection with body's natural intelligence and developing loving relationship with its signals.
6907e85c3bc8caec12bf9b490d5345af.full_text:
Your body is telling you something, are you listening?

"The body will never misguide you, you can trust it, and you can trust it absolutely."
Osho, The Rebellious Spirit, 22 ✨

OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind™ explores how to reconnect with the body's natural intelligence and develop a more loving relationship with its signals

This live online course supports a deeper understanding of what your body may be communicating — and how to respond with greater sensitivity and trust.

Schedule: June 16th – 22nd, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 7 days • 1 hour a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 9th, 2026

Explore the details and book the course: https://bit.ly/OSHO-TalkingBodyMind-June2026

ee31a8d896200be3154c39bd41be5918.title: Osho Active Meditations Luxury Retreat at Kasar Devi
ee31a8d896200be3154c39bd41be5918.description: 3-day luxury Osho meditation retreat in Kasar Devi's cosmic energy zone with daily active meditations and resort accommodation.
ee31a8d896200be3154c39bd41be5918.full_text:
18th - 21st June 2026

WhatsApp: +919058967526

We are guiding a 3 day luxury Osho meditation retreat in the sacred cosmic energy zone of Kasar Devi.

Stay in Almora's finest luxury resort, which in itself is an architectural delight. With Osho Active Meditations running throughout, daily.

Come, enjoy your comfort, while playing in this highly conscious energy zone (recognized in only 3 places in the world - the other 2 spots being Macchu Pichu and Stone Henge.)

This retreat is for people who are familiar with Osho and are interested in his active meditations (the original somatic therapy) or would like to learn.

Also, please note- our retreats and camps are safe spaces and your wellbeing is our highest priority- we have kicked people off our retreats for unwanted inappropriate behaviour before. If you have sexy ideas about Osho outside meditation, relaxation and awareness - we are not the place for you.

But if you are into going deep in this special energy zone- do yourself a favor and make sure you come!

#osho #luxuryretreat #activemeditation #kasardevi

04388a5de56799bef6644b7202341417.title: Healing Sexual Trauma
04388a5de56799bef6644b7202341417.description: Healing Sexual Trauma workshop at Humaniversity. Space for awareness, safety, and honest communication around sexuality and trauma.
04388a5de56799bef6644b7202341417.full_text:
Healing Sexual Trauma | 25 June - 1 July

Conscious Sexuality workshops at Humaniversity

Over the years, I have met thousands of people who carried a quiet question within themselves: "Why does something so natural feel so complicated?"

Sexuality is one of the most fundamental expressions of being human. It is present long before we understand it intellectually, and it continues to shape our sense of aliveness, confidence, and connection throughout life. And yet, for many people, sexuality is also one of the places where shame, confusion, and pain have settled most deeply.

Conscious Sexuality workshops exist because sexuality is rarely given the space it truly needs. Not a space of advice, technique, or performance, but a space of awareness, safety, and honest meetings and communication.

At Humaniversity, sexuality work has been part of our therapeutic approach for decades. We have seen, again and again, that when sexuality is met with respect, awareness and friendship, it becomes a powerful gateway to healing, sovereignty, and joy.

With love,
Sambodhi

ae05d51c9dadd26bdcd65ce144d23001.title: ALIVE
ae05d51c9dadd26bdcd65ce144d23001.description: Wake up life energy through shaking, free flow dance, contact improvisation, and conscious connection with like-hearted people.
ae05d51c9dadd26bdcd65ce144d23001.full_text:
ALIVE | AMSTERDAM 13 May 14:00-17:00

Are you ready to wake up your life energy and feel ALIVE?!

This workshop is an invitation to become alive – to shake off what you do not need anymore, to dance freely, to feel your body and connect with like-hearted people.

When you SHAKE, you allow your senses to expand, your breath to deepen, your feelings to integrate and your nervous system to relax. When you DANCE FREELY, you can find your own rhythm, your pulsation, your original flow. When we move TOGETHER, something powerful happen: our energies meet, our hearts open and we give space to real presence and connection. And, in the end we have TIME to HANG OUT, so that we may enjoy these heartfelt connections. Come and join!

What We Do:
- Shaking
- Free Flow Dance
- Contact Improv Exercises
- Hugging
- Appreciation
- Hang out

Location: Temple of Happiness, Condensatorweg 36, 1014 AX Amsterdam

359ebfe27a6569bf3523ae27945aeecf.title: OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis
359ebfe27a6569bf3523ae27945aeecf.description: Live online course exploring relaxation through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness to develop a relaxed relationship with yourself.
359ebfe27a6569bf3523ae27945aeecf.full_text:
Are you comfortable just being with yourself? 🌿

Many forms of stress come from the feeling that we always need to do something, solve something, improve something, or move somewhere else.

OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis explores relaxation from another angle: learning how to work gently with the unconscious so the body and mind can return to ease 🌹

Through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness, this live online course supports a more relaxed and natural relationship with yourself — one where rest becomes possible again.

🗓️ June 13th – 14th, 2026 
LIVE Online Course • Sat & Sun • 3 hours a day 
FREE PREVIEW: June 7th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "STRESS" in the comments.

"Relaxation comes to you when there is no urge for activity; the energy is at home, not moving anywhere. If a certain situation arises you will act, that's all, but you are not finding some excuse to act. You are at ease with yourself. Relaxation is to be at home."

Osho, Tantra: The Supreme Understanding, 4

#meditation #osho #awareness #stressmanagement #selfhypnosis #relaxation #innerwork #oshoonline

13d35c0b5c18ce677dcc44fa5d5a1931.title: Nourishment Workshop with Jayesh
13d35c0b5c18ce677dcc44fa5d5a1931.description: Explore real nourishment through self-connection. Experience what fills you up in a tangible way.
13d35c0b5c18ce677dcc44fa5d5a1931.full_text:
Nourishment Workshop with Jayesh

What if nourishment was something you could practice, not just imagine?

3 tips to try right now:
💛 Pause for 30 seconds: Close your eyes and notice what actually feels good in your body right now.
💛 Feel warmth: think of a person, a place or any moment that made you smile… remember as if it's happening now.
💛 Give: a kind word, a hug, or a smile to someone nearby.

Real nourishment isn't an idea. It's something you recognize when you feel it.

Try the steps above. Notice what shifts. You might be surprised how much is already there.

This is what we'll explore together in the Nourishment workshop with Jayesh. We'll create space to experience, in a very real way, what fills you up.

#Nourishment #SelfConnection #FeelMore #EmotionalWellbeing #AuthenticLiving

7b7b16a5b78568e658cbfe85c840d335.description: Live online course for women combining meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry to reconnect with their bodies and cultivate self-acceptance.
7b7b16a5b78568e658cbfe85c840d335.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one the world taught you to perform 🌹

"Over time, we can feel cut off from our own bodies… from who we truly are." 
Kimaya

As women, many of us learned to see ourselves through expectations, appearance, and outside opinions. Over time, it can become difficult to feel truly connected to the body — or at ease inside it 🌿

OSHO BodyLove for Women is a live online course created for women who long to feel more relaxed, accepting, and at home in themselves through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry.

A space where self-criticism softens and a more natural connection with yourself begins to grow ✨

🗓️ June 6th & 7th, 2026 
FREE PREVIEW: May 30th, 2026

66d626569ce366ecc42317fc9bcc3b71.title: Shamanic Healing Retreat
66d626569ce366ecc42317fc9bcc3b71.description: Four-day shamanic healing retreat featuring Kambo, Sananga, Sweat Lodge, Forest Bathing, and Osho Kundalini Meditation for physical, emotional, energetic, and spiritual cleansing.
66d626569ce366ecc42317fc9bcc3b71.full_text:
SHAMANIC HEALING RETREAT

27–30 August, 2026
📍 Zorba the Buddha, Delhi

✨ Your body is constantly speaking.
Sometimes through vitality.
Sometimes through exhaustion.

When life becomes crowded with stress, noise, emotional weight, and endless doing, the body often asks for something simple:

Space.

🌿 Space to release.
🌿 Space to listen.
🌿 Space to reconnect.

For four days, we gather in nature to explore ancient cleansing practices, meditation, silence, movement, and community.

🍁 The journey includes:

🐸 Kambo
👁️ Sananga
🔥 Sweat Lodge
🌳 Forest Bathing
⚡ Osho Kundalini Meditation

Each offering invites a different kind of cleansing—physical, emotional, energetic, and spiritual.

☘️ Participants often describe:
• Feeling lighter
• Greater clarity
• Renewed energy
• Deeper connection with themselves
• A sense of inner calm and balance

💬
"After participating in Shamanic Plant Medicine ceremonies, I feel more peaceful in my mind and stable in my health. It has also helped me control my weight naturally."
- Antas

🌿 In the heart of nature, surrounded by trees, birdsong, and conscious community, this retreat becomes an opportunity to step away from the familiar and remember what it feels like to simply be.

Zorba the Buddha • Delhi

#ShamanicHealing #HealingRetreat #ConsciousLiving #MeditationRetreat #ForestBathing

85c524be6f11458b6620e9037424b5e8.title: Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival
85c524be6f11458b6620e9037424b5e8.description: Residential festival combining ecstatic dance, music, and meditation to experience inner awakening, release stress, and connect with deeper consciousness.
85c524be6f11458b6620e9037424b5e8.full_text:
🔥🕉️ NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 💃✨
🌙 Dance Your Way Into Silence…

There are moments when words are not enough…
when the heart longs to express, release & celebrate 🌿

Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival is an invitation to move beyond the mind and enter a deeper experience of awareness through dance, music & meditation 🎶🕊️

Here, dance is not about perfection…
It is about freedom.
It is about losing yourself so completely in movement that only presence remains ✨

💫 When the body moves totally,
the mind becomes silent…
and meditation begins naturally.

Inspired by the spirit of celebration, devotion & consciousness, this festival creates a sacred space where movement transforms into inner awakening 🔥

🌸 Through ecstatic dance, music, meditation & collective energy, you may experience:

✨ Release of stress & emotional heaviness
✨ Deep relaxation & inner calm
✨ Joy, playfulness & freedom of expression
✨ A stronger connection with yourself & others
✨ Silence, awareness & meditative bliss

Like Shiva Nataraj - the cosmic dancer -
every movement becomes sacred, every breath becomes alive 🌺💃

No matter your age or experience, you are welcome exactly as you are 🌙
You do not need to know dance…
your soul already understands the rhythm ❤️

🌿 Open for both Women & Men
🎶 Celebrate • Dance • Meditate • Transform ✨

📍 Zorba The Buddha
📅 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival

📞+91 93119 58352

💫 Come as you are…
Leave lighter, freer & more connected to your inner self 🌸

✨ At Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival, Dance becomes Meditation… and Celebration becomes a Path to the Divine. 🕉️🔥

#NatarajSpiritualDanceFestival #DanceMeditation #SpiritualDance #MeditationInMotion #ZorbaTheBuddha

5f0780f82ad8cefeb4bdf17303f26506.full_text:
SUFIANA MEHFIL

An evening soaked in Ishq, Sufi vibes & soulful melodies…

Under the moonlit skies of Zorba The Buddha, amidst lotus ponds, whispering trees & wandering peacocks… step into a magical night where music becomes meditation.

Join us for an unforgettable live experience with Kesari Band — bringing together timeless Sufi kalaams, devotional melodies & heart-touching music that awakens love, longing & bliss within.

A night to sing, feel, sway & dissolve into the beauty of togetherness…

Sometimes ecstatic…
Sometimes meditative…
Sometimes so silent that only the heart can listen…

Begin the evening with a lavish organic vegetarian buffet dinner before diving into this soulful Mehfil.

LIVE MUSIC BY
Akshat Verma (vocals)
Gautam Sheel (vocals)
Ashish Ahuja (keyboards)
Madhur Bari (music)
Shravan Sharma (drums)
Yash Sharma (drums)

SCHEDULE
Friday, 29 May 2026
7:30 PM – Organic Dinner
8:45 PM – 10:30 PM: Sufiana Mehfil

CONTRIBUTION
₹1999 (Dinner + Concert)

CONTACT
9810806501
9773521700

Zorba The Buddha
Osho Mystical Village
Ghitorni, MG Road, New Delhi

ac5f17d0b56ebbd1630bcef006e02e2e.full_text:
🔥🕉️ NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 💃✨

🌙 What if dance could become your meditation…?

There comes a moment when the soul no longer wants to think…
it simply wants to feel, move & celebrate 🌿✨

💫 Step into a sacred space where:
🎶 Music becomes prayer
💃 Movement becomes freedom
🕊️ Silence becomes your inner home

At Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival, dance is not performance…
it is pure presence 🔥

When the body moves totally,
the mind slowly melts into stillness…
and meditation begins naturally 🌸

✨ Experience:
🌺 Ecstatic Dance & Celebration
🌙 Deep Meditation & Inner Silence
🔥 Emotional Release & Healing
💫 Joy, Freedom & Self-Expression
🕉️ A Deeper Connection with Yourself & Others

Like Shiva Nataraj — the cosmic dancer —
every step becomes sacred… every breath becomes alive 🌺💃

❤️ No dance experience needed
🌿 Open for Women & Men
✨ Just bring your energy, your openness & your heart

🎶 Dance • Celebrate • Meditate • Transform

📍 Zorba The Buddha
📅 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival
📞 93119 58352 | 98108 06501

💫 Come as you are…
Leave lighter, freer & deeply connected to your inner self 🕊️✨

7838ad593692fd133f8b08337b7366aa.title: OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind
7838ad593692fd133f8b08337b7366aa.description: Live online course exploring practical meditation methods to create space between thoughts and develop presence through four techniques.
7838ad593692fd133f8b08337b7366aa.full_text:
Be here, not there 🌿

The mind is constantly pulling attention somewhere else: later, earlier, elsewhere.

OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind is a live online course exploring simple and practical meditation methods that create space between you and your thoughts — so presence becomes something felt, not forced.

A playful exploration of four ways to find the mind's off switch ✨

🗓️ May 18th – May 22nd, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 13th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "QUIET" in the comments, and get the invitation to the course in your DMs!

"As you become skillful, as you learn the knack of not getting involved in the mind, as you learn the art of remaining aloof, away from the mind, as you learn the science of creating a distance between you and your own thoughts, more and more meditation will be showering on you" Osho, Philosophia Perennis, Series 2, 5

#meditation #osho #awareness #mindfulness #meditationpractice #presence #innerpeace #consciousliving

A 7-day immersive exploration with meditation, understanding, and direct experience

Course Theme:
"This is what the active meditation is doing: bringing the suppressed up to be expressed; bringing your tears back to life, bringing your anger, your laughter, your sadness, back to life; throwing everything out of your system so that your system becomes purified, so that your system becomes innocent again."
- Osho, The Supreme Doctrine, 3

"The day you can hypnotize yourself is a great day; something valuable has been achieved. Then you can do miracles with it, upon yourself. 1107662373e68401eb371b1f9d63ef34.description: Weekly Thursday evening free-form dance, celebration & deep meditation rooted in Osho's wisdom. 14 transformative conscious dances including Heart Dance, Chakra Dance, Ecstatic Dance & more.
1107662373e68401eb371b1f9d63ef34.full_text:
🌙✨ Circle of Mystical Dances ✨🌙

Unlock your true essence every Thursday evening!

Through free-form dance, celebration & deep meditation.

Rooted in Osho's timeless wisdom & yogic flow.
Movement becomes a doorway to silence, bliss & balance. 🕉️🌌

Explore 1 of 14 transformative conscious dances weekly:

❤️ Heart Dance– Open your heart's wild rhythm!
🔥 Elemental Dance– Channel earth, fire, water, air!
🌀 Chakra Dance– Activate your energy centers.
⏹️ OSHO Gurdjieff Stop Dance– Sudden awareness bursts!
🎨 Creative Movement Therapy– Heal through expression.
🦋 Dance of Evolution– Journey through life's stages!
🌀 Sufi Whirling Primal Dance– Spin into the divine.
🌌 OSHO No-Dimensions– Beyond mind, pure freedom!
🤝 Contact Improvisation– Connect body to body.
🌊 5Rhythms– Flow through stillness, chaos, lyrical!
🙏 Gurdjieff Sacred Dances– Ancient patterns of awakening.
🎉 Ecstatic Dance– Let go & surrender to joy!
☮️ Dances of Universal Peace– Harmony in unity.

At Zorba the Buddha, Osho Mystical Village – a safe haven!
For joyful self-expression & inner exploration. 🏰🙌

Sessions start at 7 PM: Mystical dance immersion.
Followed by organic buffet dinner in communal bliss! 🍲🌿

No dance experience required – just presence & openness!
Beginners & experts welcome to this sacred circle. 💖✨

Real Transformations:
"Reconnected with my inner child–pure magic!"–Sameera
"Stunning meditative dances. I live for Thursdays!"– Riya ❤️

📅 Every Thursday, 7 PM onwards
📱 Contact: +91 93119 58352
📍 Zorba The Buddha, 7, Tropical Drive, Ghitorni, Mehrauli-Gurgaon Rd, New Delhi-110030

Join our 'Circle of Mystical Dances' WhatsApp group!
Build meaningful bonds with like-minded spiritual souls. 👥🕉️💫

Be the woman you feel, not the one you see 🌹

So much energy goes into looking at ourselves from the outside.

relating to the body through feeling, awareness, relaxation, movement, and presence 🌿

A live online course created for women who want a more loving and conscious connection with themselves — beyond image, performance, or self-judgment.

"A woman is more capable of going into meditation than a man is. The male energy is aggressive, violent, outgoing, extrovert, and the female energy is introvert, passive, ingoing....

.... It is easier to enter godliness through the body of a woman than through the body of a man."

Osho, The Dhammapada: The Way of the Buddha, Vol. 5, 2

51dd4cb346140bfd88fd7f2c44f971b6.full_text:
🌙✨ OSHO Zen Tarot Reader's Training ✨🌙

Step into a journey beyond prediction… into awareness, intuition & inner clarity.
At the serene space of Zorba the Buddha, immerse yourself in the transformative wisdom of the Osho Zen Tarot.

This is not about telling the future - 
it's about understanding the present moment deeply🌀

Learn to read the cards as a mirror of consciousness,
decode emotions, patterns & energy blocks,
and guide yourself & others with insight, presence & compassion. 🌿🔮

Whether you're a seeker, healer, or simply curious—
this training opens the door to meditation through awareness. 🕉️

✨ What you'll experience:
• Intuitive card reading techniques
• Deep connection with your inner voice
• Meditative processes & self-exploration
• Real-time practice & guidance

Let the cards become a doorway…
from mind to no-mind, from confusion to clarity. 🌌

📍 Venue: Zorba the Buddha, New Delhi
📩 Limited seats | Prior registration required

#OshoZenTarot #TarotTraining #OshoMeditation #ZorbaTheBuddha #SpiritualGrowth✨

81046c47af429de3132aaa0296f25ddb.title: Osho Meditation Retreat
81046c47af429de3132aaa0296f25ddb.description: Three-day meditation retreat at Osho Ashram featuring meditation sessions, meals, and accommodation for seekers of all backgrounds.
81046c47af429de3132aaa0296f25ddb.full_text:
Next retreat 21-24 May 2026.

A review from our latest retreat:

"I have come to the Osho Ashram for a three-day retreat. One meditation session has just ended, and another is about to begin. This is our hall where the meditation takes place, and these are all the Swamis and seekers here between sessions.

The main reason I'm making this video is this: for anyone who has misconceptions about what happens at Osho—thinking it's like this or like that—let me clear it up for you.

It's only meditation. You get great sleep and good food. Everyone should come here. If you're already happy and doing well in life, it's not necessary, but I think you should experience everything life has to offer.

There are many Hindus here, people from Gujarat, and many Muslims as well..."

To book the next one - WhatsApp +919058967526 (The only booking number).

ee61398e23bd9f1f70146e8fa1c392a1.title: Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh
ee61398e23bd9f1f70146e8fa1c392a1.description: Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. Weekend reset for sincere seekers experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness.
ee61398e23bd9f1f70146e8fa1c392a1.full_text:
Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh

Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. This retreat is a weekend reset for sincere seekers, experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness, or the weight of life's pressures; so they can reconnect to their own inner essence. A familiarity with Osho is a requirement - from reading his books, listening to his discourses or doing his meditation techniques and practices.

Includes:
• Kundalini and active dynamic meditations running through the day in the Buddha Hall and nature based spaces including the Ganga Ghats
• Range of accommodations to suit all budgets with room sharing options and private AC rooms. Starting price is ₹4300 for the 3 days, for dorm bed package.
• 3 satvik meals daily + some drinks included in cost.
• Meditations guided in Hindi and English.

Dates: 7 - 10th May
Venue: Dhyan Mandir, Lalkadh Ghat, Rishikesh
*(Arrive 4pm first Day, Finish 2pm Last day)

For more info or bookings:
+919898346475
@thetempleofbliss
@oshobliss28

Meet your facilitators:
Dimpal
Christine
Sarju

74cd4459d21db3f65a24cf6599ec1ba6.title: Osho Silence Retreat (5 days)
74cd4459d21db3f65a24cf6599ec1ba6.description: 5-day silent meditation retreat with Ma Dhyan Abha. Daily sunrise meditation, satsang, silent sitting, Bardo, Zazen, and music to deepen inner experience.
74cd4459d21db3f65a24cf6599ec1ba6.full_text:
Osho Silence Retreat (5 days)
21 - 25 October, 2026
(Opening - 20th October, evening)
With: Ma Dhyan Abha

"Silence is the soul of meditation..."

Osho has said this many times, and not only Osho, every guru has emphasized this.

This Osho silence retreat will give us the experience of how!
In Osho Sanzen, these 5 days will be of silence. Silence that arises naturally is fruitful, where the seeker does not have to go through struggle.

Morning sunrise meditation, Satsang, silent sitting, Bardo, Zazen and soothing music will help seekers go deeper with each passing day.
Every evening Satsang, Osho energy will shower on all of us. This is an advance group.

If you want to experience yourself closely, you are welcome:

Osho Sanzen, Kotla, Solan, HP
08894351962

9d7d9ed0f615dbc354723a043d691eb8.title: Osho Transformation Meditation Camp
9d7d9ed0f615dbc354723a043d691eb8.description: Three-day transformative meditation camp featuring dynamic and active meditations, deep silence, emotional cleansing, celebration, and meditative guidance in nature.
9d7d9ed0f615dbc354723a043d691eb8.full_text:
OSHO TRANSFORMATION MEDITATION CAMP
OSHO JEEVAN RUPANTARAN DHYAN SHIVIR

A Three-Day Journey of Meditation, Awareness & Inner Transformation

In the serene and deeply beautiful atmosphere of Osho Upaban, a rare and transformative meditation camp is being lovingly organized under the guidance, presence, and spiritual energy of Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.

This is not simply a meditation program — it is an invitation to move inward, rediscover silence, awaken awareness, and celebrate life in its totality. Surrounded by nature, meditation, and a vibrant energy field of seekers, these three days can become a profound turning point in one's inner journey.

VENUE:
Osho Upaban
Dobilla–17, Pokhara

CAMP DATES:
June 12 – June 14, 2026
(Jestha 29, 30 & 31, 2083)

ARRIVAL & REGISTRATION:
June 11, 2026 (Jestha 28)
From 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM

CAMP INAUGURATION & OPENING MEDITATION SESSION:
Begins from 5:00 PM onwards

FACILITATOR & SPIRITUAL GUIDE:
Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun

BOOKING & INFORMATION:
+977 984-0600056

HIGHLIGHTS OF THE CAMP:
• Dynamic & Active Meditations
• Deep Silence & Inner Stillness
• Emotional Cleansing & Awareness
• Celebration, Dance & Joyfulness
• Powerful Meditative Energy Field
• Transformative Discourses & Guidance
• A Loving Community of Seekers

"Meditation is the journey from mind to no-mind, from noise to silence, from personality to presence." — Osho

If your heart longs for peace, clarity, love, and transformation… If you wish to experience meditation beyond words and concepts… Then this sacred gathering at Osho Upaban may become an unforgettable doorway toward a new consciousness.

Swami Yoganand

e8eb48e03223c5227e59691972629ebe.description: Free nationwide seminar exploring clairvoyant power, Akashic Records, intuition awakening, and life purpose through simultaneous online sessions.
e8eb48e03223c5227e59691972629ebe.full_text:
Ready to awaken your inner vision and discover deeper truths about your life?

Join our FREE simultaneous nationwide seminar, "Beyond Physical Sight: Activating Your Clairvoyant Power" on June 27, 2026 (Saturday), from 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM. Step Into the Akashic Records to Unlock Life's Deepest Secrets. Explore powerful insights, awaken your intuition, and gain a fresh perspective on life, purpose, and possibility. Whether you are curious, seeking clarity, or longing for deeper understanding, this inspiring event offers a meaningful and uplifting experience for all.

Venue: For Cavite, it will be an Online Seminar via FB Messenger.

To register, message the FB Page: RKMRCavite to be invited to the FB Group Chat for the ONLINE seminar. Confirmation will be sent after registration.

Admission is free—bring a friend, relative, or colleague and share this inspiring experience together.

Reserve your spot today and be part of an uplifting afternoon of insight, discovery, and personal awakening. We'd love to welcome you!

For the latest updates on upcoming seminars, intensive meditation sessions, and inspirational content, be sure to like and follow our Facebook Page, Rosicrucians.RKMR.Org, and follow us on Instagram @rosicrucianrkmrorg.

fb9c3ec32fc6948bddbd9cf5a327ee71.description: Ongoing daily OSHO Dynamic Meditation sessions at 6 AM, 365 days a year. Active meditation combining movement, breathing, catharsis, and silence.
fb9c3ec32fc6948bddbd9cf5a327ee71.full_text:
Don't just sit there — meditate! For many people, meditation feels difficult because the body is still full of movement, breath, and life waiting to be expressed. OSHO Active Meditations® meet you exactly where you are. No sitting still. No pretending to be peaceful. Just a method that works with the modern body and mind, not against it.

OSHO Dynamic Meditation® — an OSHO Active Meditation designed to discover your natural being — begins with movement, breathing, catharsis, and expression. And then the silence arrives all by itself.

Experience it every morning at 6 AM at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. The doors are open 365 days a year.

See the daily meditation schedule at: https://bit.ly/Daily-Meditations-Meditation-Resort

Have you tried OSHO Dynamic Meditation? Please share how it felt✨

8bd1b01ef3569c8d1d3513df248ab27a.description: Promotional content about the OSHO International Meditation Resort's year-round operations and philosophy of integrating spiritual and worldly life.
8bd1b01ef3569c8d1d3513df248ab27a.full_text:
This or that? At the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India, the answer is: this AND that.

Alone or together? Both.
Centering or stretching? Both.
Releasing or containing? Both.
Humming or shaking? Both.
Exploring or celebrating? Both.

That's the way of Zorba the Buddha — dancing, singing, eating, loving, and living with joy. Osho's revolutionary vision is not about choosing between the "spiritual" and the "worldly." It's all one. Wholeheartedly.
This AND that.

Come and experience the meeting of both at the OSHO International Meditation Resort, Pune, India. Open 365 days a year.

👉 Plan your visit: https://bit.ly/OSHO-Meditation-Resort-FAQs

Share with someone who lives both Zorba AND Buddha 💛
#ThisAndThat #ZorbaTheBuddha #OshoInternationalMeditationResort #MeditationRetreat #OSHOMeditation

03b3ea2514f12ab6f3f1c1f14cb036f2.title: Mystic Rose - 21 Day Meditative Therapy
03b3ea2514f12ab6f3f1c1f14cb036f2.description: 21-day online meditative therapy with three phases: Week 1 Laughter, Week 2 Tears, Week 3 Silence. Dissolves emotional scars through total participation and awareness.
03b3ea2514f12ab6f3f1c1f14cb036f2.full_text:
Don't laugh it off — laugh it on!

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

📅 September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

Explore the course and reserve your place: https://bit.ly/OSHO-MysticRose-Sep2026

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

#meditation #osho #awareness #mysticrose #meditativetherapy #laughter #silence #oshoo

e76b3e9f7e4453117e3955aeafd84304.description: Live online course exploring reconnection with body's natural intelligence and developing loving relationship with its signals.
e76b3e9f7e4453117e3955aeafd84304.full_text:
Your body is telling you something, are you listening?

"The body will never misguide you, you can trust it, and you can trust it absolutely."
Osho, The Rebellious Spirit, 22 ✨

OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind™ explores how to reconnect with the body's natural intelligence and develop a more loving relationship with its signals

This live online course supports a deeper understanding of what your body may be communicating — and how to respond with greater sensitivity and trust.

Date: June 16th – 22nd, 2026
Format: LIVE Online Course
Duration: 7 days, 1 hour a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 9th, 2026

Booking: https://bit.ly/OSHO-TalkingBodyMind-June2026

f0bd04481b638527071b8de83c928c2f.title: Sound Healing & Voice Opening Retreat
f0bd04481b638527071b8de83c928c2f.description: 4-day immersive journey of emotional release, sacred sound healing, breath & voice activation, meditation, and reconnecting with authentic self.
f0bd04481b638527071b8de83c928c2f.full_text:
✨ What if healing isn't about "fixing" yourself…
but about returning to your natural frequency? 🎶

You carry more than thoughts inside you…
You carry unspoken emotions, suppressed energy & silent exhaustion. 🌙

And sometimes…
talking doesn't heal.
✨ Sound does.

Because sound moves where words cannot.
It travels through the body… softening stress, opening emotions & calming the nervous system. 🤍

A vibration can release heaviness.
A chant can awaken silence.
A voice can become medicine.

🌿 Sound Healing & Voice Opening Retreat
📅 04th – 08th June 2026
📍 Zorba The Buddha
📞 93119 58352

🌌 A 4-day immersive journey of:

✨ Emotional Release
✨ Sacred Sound Healing
✨ Breath & Voice Activation
✨ Meditation & Inner Silence
✨ Reconnecting with your authentic self

🎵 This isn't a music class…
It's a remembrance.

Of the voice you silenced.
Of the peace you've been searching for.
Of the rhythm your soul already knows. 🌿

✨ Come as you are…
and leave lighter, open & alive.

📩 DM to reserve your space

#SoundHealing #VoiceOpening #MeditationRetreat #InnerHealing #HealingThroughSound #SpiritualRetreat #ZorbaTheBuddha #ConsciousLiving #Breathwork #EnergyHealing

cda2581589a80273b41bd10bdaa55292.title: Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival
cda2581589a80273b41bd10bdaa55292.description: Ecstatic dance, music, and meditation festival for inner awakening, stress release, and meditative bliss. Open to all ages and experience levels.
cda2581589a80273b41bd10bdaa55292.full_text:
🔥🕉️ NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 💃✨
🌙 Dance Your Way Into Silence…

There are moments when words are not enough…
when the heart longs to express, release & celebrate 🌿

Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival is an invitation to move beyond the mind and enter a deeper experience of awareness through dance, music & meditation 🎶🕊️

Here, dance is not about perfection…
It is about freedom.
It is about losing yourself so completely in movement that only presence remains ✨

💫 When the body moves totally,
the mind becomes silent…
and meditation begins naturally.

Inspired by the spirit of celebration, devotion & consciousness, this festival creates a sacred space where movement transforms into inner awakening 🔥

🌸 Through ecstatic dance, music, meditation & collective energy, you may experience:

✨ Release of stress & emotional heaviness
✨ Deep relaxation & inner calm
✨ Joy, playfulness & freedom of expression
✨ A stronger connection with yourself & others
✨ Silence, awareness & meditative bliss

Like Shiva Nataraj - the cosmic dancer -
every movement becomes sacred, every breath becomes alive 🌺💃

No matter your age or experience, you are welcome exactly as you are 🌙
You do not need to know dance…
your soul already understands the rhythm ❤️

🌿 Open for both Women & Men
🎶 Celebrate • Dance • Meditate • Transform ✨

📍 Zorba The Buddha
📅 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival

📞+91 93119 58352

💫 Come as you are…
Leave lighter, freer & more connected to your inner self 🌸

✨ At Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival, Dance becomes Meditation… and Celebration becomes a Path to the Divine. 🕉️🔥

#NatarajSpiritualDanceFestival #DanceMeditation #SpiritualDance #MeditationInMotion #ZorbaTheBuddha

491f16194e8940fb07b34c76d6d39d8e.title: Shamanic Healing Retreat
491f16194e8940fb07b34c76d6d39d8e.description: Four-day nature-based retreat featuring Kambo, Sananga, Sweat Lodge, Forest Bathing, and Osho Kundalini Meditation for physical, emotional, and spiritual cleansing.
491f16194e8940fb07b34c76d6d39d8e.full_text:
SHAMANIC HEALING RETREAT

27–30 August, 2026
📍 Zorba the Buddha, Delhi

✨ Your body is constantly speaking.
Sometimes through vitality.
Sometimes through exhaustion.

When life becomes crowded with stress, noise, emotional weight, and endless doing, the body often asks for something simple:

Space.

🌿 Space to release.
🌿 Space to listen.
🌿 Space to reconnect.

For four days, we gather in nature to explore ancient cleansing practices, meditation, silence, movement, and community.

🍁 The journey includes:

🐸 Kambo
👁️ Sananga
🔥 Sweat Lodge
🌳 Forest Bathing
⚡ Osho Kundalini Meditation

Each offering invites a different kind of cleansing—physical, emotional, energetic, and spiritual.

☘️ Participants often describe:
• Feeling lighter
• Greater clarity
• Renewed energy
• Deeper connection with themselves
• A sense of inner calm and balance

💬
"After participating in Shamanic Plant Medicine ceremonies, I feel more peaceful in my mind and stable in my health. It has also helped me control my weight naturally."
- Antas

🌿 In the heart of nature, surrounded by trees, birdsong, and conscious community, this retreat becomes an opportunity to step away from the familiar and remember what it feels like to simply be.

Zorba the Buddha • Delhi

8b59c537efb23a8f3cd1e1698ec2a5de.full_text:
SUFIANA MEHFIL
An evening soaked in Ishq, Sufi vibes & soulful melodies…

Under the moonlit skies of Zorba The Buddha, amidst lotus ponds, whispering trees & wandering peacocks… step into a magical night where music becomes meditation.

Join us for an unforgettable live experience with Kesari Band — bringing together timeless Sufi kalaams, devotional melodies & heart-touching music that awakens love, longing & bliss within.

A night to sing, feel, sway & dissolve into the beauty of togetherness…

Sometimes ecstatic…
Sometimes meditative…
Sometimes so silent that only the heart can listen…

Begin the evening with a lavish organic vegetarian buffet dinner before diving into this soulful Mehfil.

LIVE MUSIC BY:
🎤 Akshat Verma
🎤 Gautam Sheel
🎹 Ashish Ahuja
🎼 Madhur Bari
🥁 Shravan Sharma
🥁 Yash Sharma

0b867b586092b663785bdd1f6a1cd1cd.title: Healing Sexual Trauma
0b867b586092b663785bdd1f6a1cd1cd.description: Conscious Sexuality workshop addressing sexual trauma through awareness, safety, and healing.
0b867b586092b663785bdd1f6a1cd1cd.full_text:
Healing Sexual Trauma | 25 June - 1 July

Conscious Sexuality workshops at Humaniversity

Over the years, I have met thousands of people who carried a quiet question within themselves: "Why does something so natural feel so complicated?"

Sexuality is one of the most fundamental expressions of being human. It is present long before we understand it intellectually, and it continues to shape our sense of aliveness, confidence, and connection throughout life. And yet, for many people, sexuality is also one of the places where shame, confusion, and pain have settled most deeply.

Conscious Sexuality workshops exist because sexuality is rarely given the space it truly needs. Not a space of advice, technique, or performance, but a space of awareness, safety, and honest meetings and communication.

At Humaniversity, sexuality work has been part of our therapeutic approach for decades. We have seen, again and again, that when sexuality is met with respect, awareness and friendship, it becomes a powerful gateway to healing, sovereignty, and joy.

With love,
Sambodhi

6f216ba3a19fe13fb2051f3c72e4b898.full_text:
🌙✨ Circle of Mystical Dances ✨🌙

Unlock your true essence every Thursday evening!

Through free-form dance, celebration & deep meditation.

Rooted in Osho's timeless wisdom & yogic flow.
Movement becomes a doorway to silence, bliss & balance. 🕉️🌌

Explore 1 of 14 transformative conscious dances weekly:

❤️ Heart Dance– Open your heart's wild rhythm!

🔥 Elemental Dance– Channel earth, fire, water, air!

🌀 Chakra Dance– Activate your energy centers.

⏹️ OSHO Gurdjieff Stop Dance– Sudden awareness bursts!

🎨 Creative Movement Therapy– Heal through expression.

🦋 Dance of Evolution– Journey through life's stages!

🌀 Sufi Whirling Primal Dance– Spin into the divine.

🌌 OSHO No-Dimensions– Beyond mind, pure freedom!

🤝 Contact Improvisation– Connect body to body.

🌊 5Rhythms– Flow through stillness, chaos, lyrical!

🙏 Gurdjieff Sacred Dances– Ancient patterns of awakening.

🎉 Ecstatic Dance– Let go & surrender to joy!

☮️ Dances of Universal Peace– Harmony in unity.

At Zorba the Buddha, Osho Mystical Village – a safe haven!

For joyful self-expression & inner exploration. 🏰🙌

Sessions start at 7 PM: Mystical dance immersion.
Followed by organic buffet dinner in communal bliss! 🍲🌿

No dance experience required – just presence & openness!
Beginners & experts welcome to this sacred circle. 💖✨

Real Transformations:
"Reconnected with my inner child–pure magic!"–Sameera 
"Stunning meditative dances. I live for Thursdays!"– Riya ❤️

📅 Every Thursday, 7 PM onwards
📱 Contact: +91 93119 58352
📍 Zorba The Buddha, 7, Tropical Drive, Ghitorni, Mehrauli-Gurgaon Rd, New Delhi-110030

Join our 'Circle of Mystical Dances' WhatsApp group!
Build meaningful bonds with like-minded spiritual souls. 👥🕉️💫

cf2a3c23f742a37d145c5af382a773d5.full_text:

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

🗓️ September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "ROSE" to explore the course and reserve your place.

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

f0002f37fd3879279d0c55fc4d119d35.title: OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis
f0002f37fd3879279d0c55fc4d119d35.description: Live online course exploring relaxation through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness to support a more relaxed relationship with yourself.
f0002f37fd3879279d0c55fc4d119d35.full_text:
Are you comfortable just being with yourself? 🌿

Many forms of stress come from the feeling that we always need to do something, solve something, improve something, or move somewhere else.

OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis explores relaxation from another angle: learning how to work gently with the unconscious so the body and mind can return to ease 🌹

Through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness, this live online course supports a more relaxed and natural relationship with yourself — one where rest becomes possible again.

🗓️ June 13th – 14th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • Sat & Sun • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 7th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "STRESS" in the comments.

"Relaxation comes to you when there is no urge for activity; the energy is at home, not moving anywhere. If a certain situation arises you will act, that's all, but you are not finding some excuse to act. You are at ease with yourself. Relaxation is to be at home."

Osho, Tantra: The Supreme Understanding, 4

#meditation #osho #awareness #stressmanagement #selfhypnosis #relaxation #innerwork #oshoonline

90b3ebd3ee0004822985c377df9511f8.title: Nourishment Workshop with Jayesh
90b3ebd3ee0004822985c377df9511f8.description: Create space to experience what fills you up. Explore real nourishment through guided practices and self-connection.
90b3ebd3ee0004822985c377df9511f8.full_text:
Nourishment Workshop with Jayesh

What if nourishment was something you could practice, not just imagine?

3 Tips to Try Right Now:

💛 Pause for 30 seconds: Close your eyes and notice what actually feels good in your body right now.

💛 Feel warmth: Think of a person, a place or any moment that made you smile… remember as if it's happening now.

💛 Give: A kind word, a hug, or a smile to someone nearby.

Real nourishment isn't an idea. It's something you recognize when you feel it.

Try the steps above. Notice what shifts. You might be surprised how much is already there.

This is what we'll explore together in the Nourishment workshop with Jayesh. We'll create space to experience, in a very real way, what fills you up.

#Nourishment #SelfConnection #FeelMore #EmotionalWellbeing #AuthenticLiving

7426509c114e3778dc07df30f527bcf2.title: First Meditation Camp of Osho
7426509c114e3778dc07df30f527bcf2.description: Historical account of the first meditation camp conducted by Osho in 1964, where discourses were recorded and published.
7426509c114e3778dc07df30f527bcf2.full_text:
First Meditation Camp of Osho

From the evening of 3rd June, 1964, a five day meditation camp was conducted by Osho (then known as Acharya Rajneesh) at Ranakpur, Rajasthan.

This Camp became a landmark in Osho's work because for the first time His discourses and meditations were recorded (in Hindi) and published in a book named 'Sadhana-Path'. The English book is named 'The Perfect Way'.

www.osholoverskerala.com

268ae8d7cb6a90f9bf5747befaa32a33.title: Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh
268ae8d7cb6a90f9bf5747befaa32a33.description: Weekend reset with active meditations for energetic realignment. Kundalini and dynamic meditations, accommodations, satvik meals included.
268ae8d7cb6a90f9bf5747befaa32a33.full_text:
Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh

Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. This retreat is a weekend reset for sincere seekers, experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness, or the weight of life's pressures; so they can reconnect to their own inner essence. A familiarity with Osho is a requirement - from reading his books, listening to his discourses or doing his meditation techniques and practices.

Includes:
• Kundalini and active dynamic meditations running through the day in the Buddha Hall and nature based spaces including the Ganga Ghats
• Range of accommodations to suit all budgets with room sharing options and private AC rooms. Starting price is ₹4300 for the 3 days, for dorm bed package.
• 3 satvik meals daily + some drinks included in cost.
• Meditations guided in Hindi and English.

7 - 10th May

Dhyan Mandir,
Lalkadi Ghat,
Rishikesh

*(Arrive 4pm first Day, Finish 2pm Last day)

For more info or bookings:
+919898346475
@thetempleofbliss
@oshobliss28

Meet your facilitators:
Dimpal
Christine
Sarju

ce2da679f983fa926eda88ead45ec041.full_text:
And that's a wrap on our first Meditation Camp in Dhyan Mandir!

A big thank you to our wonderful facilitators. 🙏♥️

A special thank you to Dimple Maa who flew in from Osho Manon to lead this opening retreat 🙏♥️. With your 20 years of teaching experience leading in Osho Manon in Mehsana, it was an honour to be in your sessions.

The next retreat if you'd like to book on, is from May 21-24, 2026, again in Dhyan Mandir, Rishikesh.

6bce7d97be0eb12caa4da69c0fe733ff.description: Meditation retreat with sessions in Hindi and English. Multiple accommodation options available.
6bce7d97be0eb12caa4da69c0fe733ff.full_text:
हमारी अगली रिट्रीट की बुकिंग तेज़ी से भर रही है!

सत्र हिंदी और अंग्रेजी दोनों भाषाओं में आयोजित किए जाएंगे।
हमारे पास ठहरने के कई विकल्प उपलब्ध हैं, जिनकी शुरुआत डॉर्मिटरी (Dormitory) से होती है। इसके अलावा हमारे पास शेयरिंग रूम और प्राइवेट रूम के विकल्प भी हैं, जिनमें AC और नॉन-AC दोनों की सुविधा उपलब्ध है।

शुल्क में प्रतिदिन 3 समय का भोजन और चाय, साथ ही 5 से अधिक सक्रिय ध्यान (active meditations) सत्र शामिल हैं।

• डॉर्म बेड की कीमत ₹4300 से शुरू होती है।

अधिक जानकारी या बुकिंग के लिए: +919058967526

हम यहाँ आपका स्वागत करने के लिए उत्सुक हैं! ♥️

ऋषिकेश टूर पैकेज (वैकल्पिक):
ध्यान शिविर के अंत में हमारे पास वैकल्पिक ऋषिकेश टूर पैकेज भी उपलब्ध हैं। यदि आप नए दोस्तों के साथ बिना किसी परेशानी के इस क्षेत्र को और करीब से देखना चाहते हैं, तो आप इसे चुन सकते हैं (टूर का शुल्क अलग है, जिसे आप बुकिंग के समय या कैंप के दौरान ले सकते हैं).

Our next retreat is filling up!

Sessions are held in Hindi & English.

We have a variety of accommodation options that start with dorm style beds. We also have sharing room options and private rooms, both with AC or non-AC. The price includes 3 meals daily and chai, as well as 5+ active meditations daily.

Dorm beds price starts at ₹4300.

For more details or booking: +919058967526

We'd love to have see you here! ♥️

Also we have optional add-on Rishikesh tours packages at the end of the Meditation Camp, if you'd like to explore more of the area with new friends, hassle free (tours are an extra cost and can be purchased when booking, or during the camp).

84a9ec77c5e512127492010ea42fee7a.full_text:
Say yes to your meditation journey, online!

Your meditation journey does not have to look perfect. 🌿

It can begin exactly where you are:
tired, curious, overwhelmed, open, resistant, longing for something deeper.

Sometimes saying yes is enough.

👉🏻 Write "OIO" in the comments and receive the link of the upcoming live online courses 🗓️
👉🏻 Explore the meditation journey that supports you now ✨

OSHO International Online offers live courses exploring awareness through movement, breath, emotional release, relaxation, intimacy, self-hypnosis, and meditation — all guided in a practical and grounded way.

#meditation #osho #awareness #innerjourney 🌿✨

e93e33bc55871efa955ed3021530eab2.title: OSHO BodyLove for Women
e93e33bc55871efa955ed3021530eab2.description: Live online course exploring body connection through feeling, awareness, relaxation, movement, and presence for women seeking conscious self-relation beyond judgment.
e93e33bc55871efa955ed3021530eab2.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one you see 🌹

So much energy goes into looking at ourselves from the outside.

OSHO BodyLove for Women explores another possibility:
relating to the body through feeling, awareness, relaxation, movement, and presence 🌿

A live online course created for women who want a more loving and conscious connection with themselves — beyond image, performance, or self-judgment.

🗓️ June 6th & 7th, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 30th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "BODYLOVE" in the comments and get the link to explore the course!

"A woman is more capable of going into meditation than a man is. The male energy is aggressive, violent, outgoing, extrovert, and the female energy is introvert, passive, ingoing….

…. It is easier to enter godliness through the body of a woman than through the body of a man."

Osho, The Dhammapada: The Way of the Buddha, Vol. 5, 2

#meditation #osho #awareness #bodylove #womenandmeditation #embodiedawareness #selflove #oshoonline

e3eab9f42dd3a938ed935fa4d3fbfc92.title: OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind
e3eab9f42dd3a938ed935fa4d3fbfc92.description: Live online course exploring practical meditation methods to create space between you and thoughts, enabling presence as a felt experience.
e3eab9f42dd3a938ed935fa4d3fbfc92.full_text:
Be here, not there 🌿

The mind is constantly pulling attention somewhere else:
later, earlier, elsewhere.

OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind is a live online course exploring simple and practical meditation methods that create space between you and your thoughts — so presence becomes something felt, not forced.

A playful exploration of four ways to find the mind's off switch ✨

🗓️ May 18th – May 22nd, 2026 
FREE PREVIEW: May 13th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "QUIET" in the comments, and get the invitation to the course in your DMs!

"As you become skillful, as you learn the knack of not getting involved in the mind, as you learn the art of remaining aloof, away from the mind, as you learn the science of creating a distance between you and your own thoughts, more and more meditation will be showering on you" Osho, Philosophia Perennis, Series 2, 5

#meditation #osho #awareness #mindfulness #meditationpractice #presence #innerpeace #consciousliving

why do we still feel blocked, disconnected, or stuck?

Osho, A Sudden Clash of Thunder, 8

f3f1cbad55236fc950790eaa2d0a1196.title: Osho Ashram Meditation Retreat
f3f1cbad55236fc950790eaa2d0a1196.description: Three-day meditation retreat at Osho Ashram. Includes meditation sessions, accommodation, and meals. Open to all seekers regardless of background.
f3f1cbad55236fc950790eaa2d0a1196.full_text:
Next retreat 21-24 May 2026.

A review from our latest retreat 🤩

"I have come to the Osho Ashram for a three-day retreat. One meditation session has just ended, and another is about to begin. This is our hall where the meditation takes place, and these are all the Swamis and seekers here between sessions.

The main reason I'm making this video is this: for anyone who has misconceptions about what happens at Osho—thinking it's like this or like that—let me clear it up for you.

It's only meditation. You get great sleep and good food. Everyone should come here. If you're already happy and doing well in life, it's not necessary, but I think you should experience everything life has to offer.

There are many Hindus here, people from Gujarat, and many Muslims as well..."

To book the next one - WhatsApp +919058967526. (The only booking number).

#oshobliss #meditationcamp #osho #retreat rishikesh

a7f29040b5ef119863c3da138215fd4f.title: Meditation Camp at Kasar Devi
a7f29040b5ef119863c3da138215fd4f.description: Meditation camp in the mountains at Kasar Devi, known for strong geomagnetic field supporting deep meditation practice.
a7f29040b5ef119863c3da138215fd4f.full_text:
Our last retreat for May in Rishikesh was absolutely beautiful 🙏✨✨

Thank you to all the wonderful participants who came and shared your energy with the group.

We took some of these sessions indoors when the temperature started to soar - to keep our focusing moving towards deep meditation.

So wonderful to meet you all. Life long connections definitely made.

In June we are taking our meditation camp up to Kasar Devi chasing the cooler climate. The mountains also being a special energy, and Kasar itself has an unusually strong geomagnetic field. This supports meditation with such ease.

If you'd like to join us in Kasar Devi, WhatsApp +919058967526.

And if you're wanting to join us in Rishikesh, follow @oshobliss_experiences to stay up to date with when we'll be back.

7ada98a5ec5c0f479e9c596b4084ee10.title: May 2026 Rishikesh Meditation Camp
7ada98a5ec5c0f479e9c596b4084ee10.description: Osho meditation camp in Rishikesh with facilitators Christine and Sarju offering breathing work and meditation guidance.
7ada98a5ec5c0f479e9c596b4084ee10.full_text:
May 2026 Rishikesh Meditation Camp - Meet Your Facilitators

Christine:
Born in Australia, on the path of inner seeking since 2008 when she began learning meditation at the London Buddhist Centre. Previously working as a Humanities teacher at management level, she realized the best way to bring change to the world is to start from within. In 2021, she shifted her career towards conscious and spiritual work. She is trained in Osho meditation and other breathwork practices. Over the past 5 years, she has facilitated meditation and breathwork in London (UK), Australia, India, at the Osho International Meditation Resort (Pune), and online. In the UK, she has shared her work from psychiatric hospitals to schools for children with criminal tendencies, corporate wellness, and community relaxation sessions. Christine provides a safe space for emotional release, connecting with one's true nature, and experimenting with consciousness, so individuals can become more empowered by knowing themselves and existence.

Sarju:
Born in Gujarat, India, and an Osho sannyasin since 2008. Previously an entrepreneur running oil mills and tire plants, and worked in construction management in London. While running his business in India, he frequently stayed at Osho ashrams in Madhavpur, Mehsana, and Pune, where he had the opportunity to go deep within. During his exploration of "Zorba the Buddha," he learned the great value of Zen discipline and incorporates this principle into his work to help others discover and know their own truth. Sarju began informally teaching friends breathing techniques and practices, which transformed into facilitating Osho meditation in 2022. He has conducted numerous intensive and personal sessions in London, at the Osho International Meditation Resort in Pune, and throughout India.

#meditationcamp #osho #oshomeditatio​n #osho #rishikesh

3ba3e38840601d76305d349bdd72e215.title: OSHO BodyLove for Women
3ba3e38840601d76305d349bdd72e215.description: Live online course for women using meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry to develop relaxation, acceptance, and connection with oneself.
3ba3e38840601d76305d349bdd72e215.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one the world taught you to perform 🌹

"Over time, we can feel cut off from our own bodies… from who we truly are." 
Kimaya

As women, many of us learned to see ourselves through expectations, appearance, and outside opinions. Over time, it can become difficult to feel truly connected to the body — or at ease inside it 🌿

OSHO BodyLove for Women is a live online course created for women who long to feel more relaxed, accepting, and at home in themselves through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry.

A space where self-criticism softens and a more natural connection with yourself begins to grow ✨

🗓️ June 6th & 7th, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 30th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "BODYLOVE" to explore the course.

5d0e3ecf58f8a6e71488035f4867d89b.title: Osho Luxury Meditation Retreat at Kasar Devi
5d0e3ecf58f8a6e71488035f4867d89b.description: 3-day luxury Osho active meditation retreat in sacred Kasar Devi energy zone. Daily active meditations, architectural luxury resort stay. For those familiar with Osho's work.
5d0e3ecf58f8a6e71488035f4867d89b.full_text:
18th - 21st June 2026

WhatsApp: +919058967526

We are guiding a 3 day luxury Osho meditation retreat in the sacred cosmic energy zone of Kasar Devi.

Stay in Almora's finest luxury resort, which in itself is an architectural delight. With Osho Active Meditations running throughout, daily.

Come, enjoy your comfort, while playing in this highly conscious energy zone (recognized in only 3 places in the world - the other 2 spots being Macchu Pichu and Stone Henge.)

This retreat is for people who are familiar with Osho and are interested in his active meditations (the original somatic therapy) or would like to learn.

Also, please note- our retreats and camps are safe spaces and your wellbeing is our highest priority- we have kicked people off our retreats for unwanted inappropriate behaviour before. If you have sexy ideas about Osho outside meditation, relaxation and awareness - we are not the place for you.

But if you are into going deep in this special energy zone- do yourself a favor and make sure you come!

#osho #luxuryretreat #activemeditation #kasardevi

f5ca6d141caab7e295b840aab27de21e.title: Osho Silence Retreat (5 Days)
f5ca6d141caab7e295b840aab27de21e.description: 5-day silent retreat with sunrise meditation, satsang, zazen, bardo, and evening spiritual gatherings led by Ma Dhyan Abha.
f5ca6d141caab7e295b840aab27de21e.full_text:
ओशो Silence Retreat (5 Days)
21 - 25 October, 2026
(Opening - 20th October, Evening)

Facilitator: Ma Dhyan Abha

"Silence is the soul of meditation..." - Osho has said this many times, and not just Osho, every guru has emphasized this.

This Osho Silence Retreat will help us experience how! These 5 days in Osho Sanzen will be in silence. Silence that arises naturally is fruitful, in which the seeker does not have to go through struggle.

Daily Schedule:
- Morning sunrise meditation
- Satsang
- Silent sitting
- Bardo
- Zazen
- Pleasant music

Each passing day, these practices will help seekers go deeper. Every evening, Osho energy will shower upon all of us in the evening satsang. This is an advanced group.

If you wish to experience yourself closely, you are welcome!

Location: Osho Sanzen, Kotla, Solan, Himachal Pradesh

Contact: 088943 51962 (Advance Booking)

Organizer: Osho Sanzen India, Kotla, Solan, Himachal Pradesh
Phone: 8894351962

e8aee57f84401f76df0f326cf82a027f.full_text:
OSHO TRANSFORMATION MEDITATION CAMP
OSHO JEEVAN RUPANTARAN DHYAN SHIVIR

A Three-Day Journey of Meditation, Awareness & Inner Transformation

In the serene and deeply beautiful atmosphere of Osho Upaban, a rare and transformative meditation camp is being lovingly organized under the guidance, presence, and spiritual energy of Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.

This is not simply a meditation program — it is an invitation to move inward, rediscover silence, awaken awareness, and celebrate life in its totality. Surrounded by nature, meditation, and a vibrant energy field of seekers, these three days can become a profound turning point in one's inner journey.

VENUE:
Osho Upaban, Dobilla–17, Pokhara

CAMP DATES:
June 12 – June 14, 2026 (Jestha 29, 30 & 31, 2083)

ARRIVAL & REGISTRATION:
June 11, 2026 (Jestha 28)
From 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM

CAMP INAUGURATION & OPENING MEDITATION SESSION:
Begins from 5:00 PM onwards

FACILITATOR & SPIRITUAL GUIDE:
Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun

HIGHLIGHTS OF THE CAMP:
✨ Dynamic & Active Meditations
✨ Deep Silence & Inner Stillness
✨ Emotional Cleansing & Awareness
✨ Celebration, Dance & Joyfulness
✨ Powerful Meditative Energy Field
✨ Transformative Discourses & Guidance
✨ A Loving Community of Seekers

BOOKING & INFORMATION:
+977 984-0600056

Organizer: Swami Yoganand

913d1adbfdd708044bd478a11a4eb039.title: Mystic Rose: 21-Day Meditative Therapy
913d1adbfdd708044bd478a11a4eb039.description: 21-day Osho meditative therapy combining laughter, tears, and silence to dissolve emotional patterns through total participation and awareness.
913d1adbfdd708044bd478a11a4eb039.full_text:
Don't laugh it off — laugh it on!

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

Dates: September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
Format: LIVE Online Course
Duration: 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

Explore the course and reserve your place: https://bit.ly/OSHO-MysticRose-Sep2026

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does." — Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

According to her, meditating for a few minutes daily brings clarity, happiness, and positive energy to life.

c2227281efb16cfe39ea73a37f561e0b.title: OSHO No-Mind
c2227281efb16cfe39ea73a37f561e0b.description: 7-day meditative therapy: one hour daily gibberish speaking followed by silent witnessing. Release overthinking and experience mental clarity.
c2227281efb16cfe39ea73a37f561e0b.full_text:
Have you tried "underthinking"? OSHO No-Mind is not what you think it is.

For 7 days, one hour a day, you speak gibberish — sounds, nonsense, whatever wants to come out. No meaning. No control.

Then for the second hour, you sit silently and witness.
By day 7, the overthinking loosens. You feel lighter, clearer, more like yourself.

OSHO No-Mind happens every month, starting on the 3rd, at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India.

Learn more and join: https://bit.ly/OSHO-No-Mind-Resort

Share this with someone whose mind won't stop talking

crop_hint.note: Group of five people, full-body composition, center framing

11892f8c3d76210fbead7931da256ff6.description: Regular daily OSHO Dynamic Meditation sessions at 6 AM, 365 days a year. Open to all.
11892f8c3d76210fbead7931da256ff6.full_text:
OSHO Active Meditations® meet you exactly where you are. No sitting still. No pretending to be peaceful. Just a method that works with the modern body and mind, not against it.

OSHO Dynamic Meditation® — an OSHO Active Meditation designed to discover your natural being — begins with movement, breathing, catharsis, and expression. And then the silence arrives all by itself.

Experience it every morning at 6 AM at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. The doors are open 365 days a year.

See the daily meditation schedule at: https://bit.ly/Daily-Meditations-Meditation-Resort

cc09c9ba674093a33a3eed9cf36af08d.title: Osho Active Meditation Luxury Retreat at Kasar Devi
cc09c9ba674093a33a3eed9cf36af08d.description: 3-day luxury Osho meditation retreat in Kasar Devi cosmic energy zone with daily active meditations and upscale accommodation.
cc09c9ba674093a33a3eed9cf36af08d.full_text:
18th - 21st June 2026

WhatsApp: +919058967526

We are guiding a 3 day luxury Osho meditation retreat in the sacred cosmic energy zone of Kasar Devi.

Stay in Almora's finest luxury resort, which in itself is an architectural delight. With Osho Active Meditations running throughout, daily.

Come, enjoy your comfort, while playing in this highly conscious energy zone (recognized in only 3 places in the world - the other 2 spots being Macchu Pichu and Stone Henge.)

This retreat is for people who are familiar with Osho and are interested in his active meditations (the original somatic therapy) or would like to learn.

Also, please note- our retreats and camps are safe spaces and your wellbeing is our highest priority- we have kicked people off our retreats for unwanted inappropriate behaviour before. If you have sexy ideas about Osho outside meditation, relaxation and awareness - we are not the place for you.

But if you are into going deep in this special energy zone- do yourself a favor and make sure you come!

#osho #luxuryretreat #activemeditation #kasardevi

29eb78e27efe1d581e114119380b08a5.full_text:
Our last retreat for May in Rishikesh was absolutely beautiful 🙏✨✨

Thank you to all the wonderful participants who came and shared your energy with the group.

We took some of these sessions indoors when the temperature started to soar - to keep our focusing moving towards deep meditation.

So wonderful to meet you all. Life long connections definitely made.

In June we are taking our meditation camp up to Kasar Devi chasing the cooler climate. The mountains also being a special energy, and Kasar itself has an unusually strong geomagnetic field. This supports meditation with such ease.

If you'd like to join us in Kasar Devi, WhatsApp +919058967526.

And if you're wanting to join us in Rishikesh, follow @oshobliss_experiences to stay up to date with when we'll be back.

#osho #ओशो #rishikesh #ध्यानशिविर #activemeditation

3b7894fd56b9cbf6cd9b1cb107028af4.title: Healing Sexual Trauma
3b7894fd56b9cbf6cd9b1cb107028af4.description: Workshop on healing sexual trauma through conscious sexuality work with awareness, safety, and honest communication.
3b7894fd56b9cbf6cd9b1cb107028af4.full_text:
Healing Sexual Trauma | 25 June - 1 July

Consious Sexuality workshop at Humaniversity

Over the years, I have met thousands of people who carried a quiet question within themselves: "Why does something so natural feel so complicated?"

Sexuality is one of the most fundamental expressions of being human. It is present long before we understand it intellectually, and it continues to shape our sense of aliveness, confidence, and connection throughout life. And yet, for many people, sexuality is also one of the places where shame, confusion, and pain have settled most deeply.

Consious Sexuality workshops exist because sexuality is rarely given the space it truly needs. Not a space of advice, technique, or performance, but a space of awareness, safety, and honest meetings and communication.

At Humaniversity, sexuality work has been part of our therapeutic approach for decades. We have seen, again and again, that when sexuality is met with respect, awareness and friendship, it becomes a powerful gateway to healing, sovereignty, and joy.

With love,
Sambodhi
