0a76eb79dabeb6b3ff314cbfa316b027.title: Mystic Rose - 21 Day Meditative Therapy
0a76eb79dabeb6b3ff314cbfa316b027.description: Three-week meditative therapy combining laughter, tears, and silence to dissolve emotional patterns through total participation and awareness.
0a76eb79dabeb6b3ff314cbfa316b027.full_text:
When was the last time you laughed so totally that thinking disappeared? 🌩️

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

🗓️ September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "ROSE" to explore the course and reserve your place.

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

b6c2da061485f49eb5130fbcf3b6f88c.title: OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis
b6c2da061485f49eb5130fbcf3b6f88c.description: Live online course exploring relaxation through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness to work gently with the unconscious mind.
b6c2da061485f49eb5130fbcf3b6f88c.full_text:
Are you comfortable just being with yourself? 🌿

Many forms of stress come from the feeling that we always need to do something, solve something, improve something, or move somewhere else.

OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis explores relaxation from another angle: learning how to work gently with the unconscious so the body and mind can return to ease 🌹

Through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness, this live online course supports a more relaxed and natural relationship with yourself — one where rest becomes possible again.

🗓️ June 13th – 14th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • Sat & Sun • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 7th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "STRESS" in the comments.

"Relaxation comes to you when there is no urge for activity; the energy is at home, not moving anywhere. If a certain situation arises you will act, that's all, but you are not finding some excuse to act. You are at ease with yourself. Relaxation is to be at home."

Osho, Tantra: The Supreme Understanding, 4

#meditation #osho #awareness #stressmanagement #selfhypnosis #relaxation #innerwork #oshoonline

3050976bcd2e97003a8ce6e29b6fedf4.title: Nourishment Workshop
3050976bcd2e97003a8ce6e29b6fedf4.description: Explore real nourishment through experience. Create space to feel what fills you up and practice authentic self-connection.
3050976bcd2e97003a8ce6e29b6fedf4.full_text:
Nourishment Workshop with Jayesh

What if nourishment was something you could practice, not just imagine?

Three Tips to Try Right Now:
💛 Pause for 30 seconds: Close your eyes and notice what actually feels good in your body right now.
💛 Feel warmth: Think of a person, a place or any moment that made you smile… remember as if it's happening now.
💛 Give: A kind word, a hug, or a smile to someone nearby.

Real nourishment isn't an idea. It's something you recognize when you feel it.

Try the steps above. Notice what shifts. You might be surprised how much is already there.

This is what we'll explore together in the Nourishment workshop with Jayesh. We'll create space to experience, in a very real way, what fills you up.

#Nourishment #SelfConnection #FeelMore #EmotionalWellbeing #AuthenticLiving

60eeffe2ab4ef09f88b0147197ead669.title: OSHO BodyLove for Women
60eeffe2ab4ef09f88b0147197ead669.description: Live online course for women to reconnect with their bodies through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry, softening self-criticism.
60eeffe2ab4ef09f88b0147197ead669.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one the world taught you to perform 🌹

"Over time, we can feel cut off from our own bodies… from who we truly are."
Kimaya

As women, many of us learned to see ourselves through expectations, appearance, and outside opinions. Over time, it can become difficult to feel truly connected to the body — or at ease inside it 🌿

OSHO BodyLove for Women is a live online course created for women who long to feel more relaxed, accepting, and at home in themselves through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry.

A space where self-criticism softens and a more natural connection with yourself begins to grow ✨

🗓️ June 6th & 7th, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 30th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "BODYLOVE" to explore the course.

#meditation #osho #awareness #bodylove #embodiedawareness #womenandmeditation #selfacceptance #oshoonline

becfff6e8c7da71fc09c96d12b7cf161.full_text:
Bring the suppressed up to BE EXPRESSED 🌩️

Your anger.
Your laughter.
Your sadness.
Your tears.
Back to life 🌿

OSHO Active Meditations In-Depth is a live online course exploring the science, structure, and transformative power behind OSHO Active Meditations.

A 7-day immersive exploration with meditation, understanding, and direct experience ✨

🗓️ June 9th – June 15th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 1.5 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 2nd, 2026

👉🏻 Write "DEPTH" to explore the course.

"This is what the active meditation is doing: bringing the suppressed up to be expressed; bringing your tears back to life, bringing your anger, your laughter, your sadness, back to life; throwing everything out of your system so that your system becomes purified, so that your system becomes innocent again."

Osho, The Supreme Doctrine, 3

583b3e4c6c572253b79b476aa3e9d68d.full_text:
Next retreat 21-24 May 2026.

A review from our latest retreat 🤩

English translation:
"I have come to the Osho Ashram for a three-day retreat. One meditation session has just ended, and another is about to begin. This is our hall where the meditation takes place, and these are all the Swamis and seekers here between sessions.

The main reason I'm making this video is this: for anyone who has misconceptions about what happens at Osho—thinking it's like this or like that—let me clear it up for you.

It's only meditation. You get great sleep and good food. Everyone should come here. If you're already happy and doing well in life, it's not necessary, but I think you should experience everything life has to offer.

There are many Hindus here, people from Gujarat, and many Muslims as well..."

To book the next one - WhatsApp +919058967526. (The only booking number).

d0cfffc67646d008bbe749d1201c1405.description: Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. Weekend reset for seekers experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness using Osho techniques.
d0cfffc67646d008bbe749d1201c1405.full_text:
OSHO MEDITATION RETREAT RISHIKESH

Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. This retreat is a weekend reset for sincere seekers, experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness, or the weight of life's pressures; so they can reconnect to their own inner essence. A familiarity with Osho is a requirement - from reading his books, listening to his discourses or doing his meditation techniques and practices.

INCLUDES:
• Kundalini and active dynamic meditations running through the day in the Buddha Hall and nature based spaces including the Ganga Ghats
• Range of accommodations to suit all budgets with room sharing options and private AC rooms. Starting price is ₹4300 for the 3 days, for dorm bed package.
• 3 satvik meals daily + some drinks included in cost.
• Meditations guided in Hindi and English.

DATE:
7 - 10th May

VENUE:
Dhyan Mandir, Lalkadi Ghat, Rishikesh

*(Arrive 4pm first Day, Finish 2pm Last day)

FOR MORE INFO OR BOOKINGS:
+919898346475
Instagram: @thetempleofbliss
Instagram: @oshobliss28

Dimpal

e2780c6fcb5236d7f9bebae9b8bf7bba.description: 4-day immersive retreat combining emotional release, sacred sound healing, breath activation, meditation, and reconnection with authentic self.
e2780c6fcb5236d7f9bebae9b8bf7bba.full_text:
✨ What if healing isn't about "fixing" yourself… but about returning to your natural frequency? 🎶

You carry more than thoughts inside you…
You carry unspoken emotions, suppressed energy & silent exhaustion. 🌙

And sometimes…
talking doesn't heal.
✨ Sound does.

Because sound moves where words cannot.
It travels through the body… softening stress, opening emotions & calming the nervous system. 🤍

A vibration can release heaviness.
A chant can awaken silence.
A voice can become medicine.

🌿 Sound Healing & Voice Opening Retreat
📅 04th – 08th June 2026
📍 Zorba The Buddha
📞 93119 58352

🌌 A 4-day immersive journey of:

✨ Emotional Release
✨ Sacred Sound Healing
✨ Breath & Voice Activation
✨ Meditation & Inner Silence
✨ Reconnecting with your authentic self

🎵 This isn't a music class…
It's a remembrance.

Of the voice you silenced.
Of the peace you've been searching for.
Of the rhythm your soul already knows. 🌿

✨ Come as you are…
and leave lighter, open & alive.

📩 DM to reserve your space

a8815db7fe1367022f7ce5d534c15db4.full_text:
🔥🕉️ NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 💃✨

🌙 What if dance could become your meditation…?

There comes a moment when the soul no longer wants to think…
it simply wants to feel, move & celebrate 🌿✨

💫 Step into a sacred space where:
🎶 Music becomes prayer
💃 Movement becomes freedom
🕊️ Silence becomes your inner home

At Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival, dance is not performance…
it is pure presence 🔥

When the body moves totally,
the mind slowly melts into stillness…
and meditation begins naturally 🌸

✨ Experience:
🌺 Ecstatic Dance & Celebration
🌙 Deep Meditation & Inner Silence
🔥 Emotional Release & Healing
💫 Joy, Freedom & Self-Expression
🕉️ A Deeper Connection with Yourself & Others

Like Shiva Nataraj — the cosmic dancer —
every step becomes sacred… every breath becomes alive 🌺💃

❤️ No dance experience needed
🌿 Open for Women & Men
✨ Just bring your energy, your openness & your heart

🎶 Dance • Celebrate • Meditate • Transform

📍 Zorba The Buddha
📅 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival
📞 93119 58352 | 98108 06501

💫 Come as you are…
Leave lighter, freer & deeply connected to your inner self 🕊️✨

6f114c1adbf316603c154191a23455d7.full_text:
NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 🔥🕉️ 💃✨
🌙 Dance Your Way Into Silence…

There are moments when words are not enough… when the heart longs to express, release & celebrate 🌿

Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival is an invitation to move beyond the mind and enter a deeper experience of awareness through dance, music & meditation 🎶🕊️

Here, dance is not about perfection… It is about freedom. It is about losing yourself so completely in movement that only presence remains ✨

💫 When the body moves totally, the mind becomes silent… and meditation begins naturally.

Inspired by the spirit of celebration, devotion & consciousness, this festival creates a sacred space where movement transforms into inner awakening 🔥

🌸 Through ecstatic dance, music, meditation & collective energy, you may experience:
✨ Release of stress & emotional heaviness
✨ Deep relaxation & inner calm
✨ Joy, playfulness & freedom of expression
✨ A stronger connection with yourself & others
✨ Silence, awareness & meditative bliss

Like Shiva Nataraj - the cosmic dancer - every movement becomes sacred, every breath becomes alive 🌺💃

No matter your age or experience, you are welcome exactly as you are 🌙
You do not need to know dance… your soul already understands the rhythm ❤️

🌿 Open for both Women & Men
🎶 Celebrate • Dance • Meditate • Transform ✨

📍 Zorba The Buddha
📅 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival

📞+91 93119 58352

💫 Come as you are… Leave lighter, freer & more connected to your inner self 🌸

✨ At Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival, Dance becomes Meditation… and Celebration becomes a Path to the Divine. 🕉️🔥

2b2cc6f7f4984da0073b1d6c4c86d805.title: Shamanic Healing Retreat
2b2cc6f7f4984da0073b1d6c4c86d805.description: Four-day nature retreat featuring Kambo, Sananga, Sweat Lodge, Forest Bathing, and Osho Kundalini Meditation for physical, emotional, energetic, and spiritual cleansing.
2b2cc6f7f4984da0073b1d6c4c86d805.full_text:
SHAMANIC HEALING RETREAT

27–30 August, 2026
📍 Zorba the Buddha, Delhi

✨ Your body is constantly speaking.
Sometimes through vitality.
Sometimes through exhaustion.

When life becomes crowded with stress, noise, emotional weight, and endless doing, the body often asks for something simple:

SPACE.

🌿 Space to release.
🌿 Space to listen.
🌿 Space to reconnect.

For four days, we gather in nature to explore ancient cleansing practices, meditation, silence, movement, and community.

THE JOURNEY INCLUDES:

🐸 KAMBO
👁️ SANANGA
🔥 SWEAT LODGE
🌳 FOREST BATHING
⚡ OSHO KUNDALINI MEDITATION

Each offering invites a different kind of cleansing—physical, emotional, energetic, and spiritual.

☘️ Participants often describe:
• Feeling lighter
• Greater clarity
• Renewed energy
• Deeper connection with themselves
• A sense of inner calm and balance

💬 "After participating in Shamanic Plant Medicine ceremonies, I feel more peaceful in my mind and stable in my health. It has also helped me control my weight naturally."
- Antas

🌿 In the heart of nature, surrounded by trees, birdsong, and conscious community, this retreat becomes an opportunity to step away from the familiar and remember what it feels like to simply be.

ZORBA THE BUDDHA • DELHI

#ShamanicHealing #HealingRetreat #ConsciousLiving #MeditationRetreat #ForestBathing

43b9c9fe1be5899adaccebef84d95c4e.full_text:
SUFIANA MEHFIL
An evening soaked in Ishq, Sufi vibes & soulful melodies…

Under the moonlit skies of Zorba The Buddha, amidst lotus ponds, whispering trees & wandering peacocks… step into a magical night where music becomes meditation.

Join us for an unforgettable live experience with Kesari Band — bringing together timeless Sufi kalaams, devotional melodies & heart-touching music that awakens love, longing & bliss within.

A night to sing, feel, sway & dissolve into the beauty of togetherness…

Sometimes ecstatic…
Sometimes meditative…
Sometimes so silent that only the heart can listen…

Begin the evening with a lavish organic vegetarian buffet dinner before diving into this soulful Mehfil.

LIVE MUSIC BY
Akshat Verma (Vocals)
Gautam Sheel (Vocals)
Ashish Ahuja (Piano)

Shravan Sharma (Drums)
Yash Sharma (Drums)

"A woman is more capable of going into meditation than a man is. The male energy is aggressive, violent, outgoing, extrovert, and the female energy is introvert, passive, ingoing….

…. It is easier to enter godliness through the body of a woman than through the body of a man."

Osho, The Dhammapada: The Way of the Buddha, Vol. 5, 2

e74dce1a6c714cc60694e1f849a3614f.full_text:
OSHO Zen Tarot Reader's Training

Step into a journey beyond prediction… into awareness, intuition & inner clarity.
At the serene space of Zorba the Buddha, immerse yourself in the transformative wisdom of the Osho Zen Tarot.

This is not about telling the future - it's about understanding the present moment deeply

Learn to read the cards as a mirror of consciousness, decode emotions, patterns & energy blocks, and guide yourself & others with insight, presence & compassion.

Whether you're a seeker, healer, or simply curious— this training opens the door to meditation through awareness.

What you'll experience:
• Intuitive card reading techniques
• Deep connection with your inner voice
• Meditative processes & self-exploration
• Real-time practice & guidance

Let the cards become a doorway… from mind to no-mind, from confusion to clarity.

Venue: Zorba the Buddha, New Delhi
Limited seats | Prior registration required

A playful exploration of four ways to find the mind's off switch ✨

"As you become skillful, as you learn the knack of not getting involved in the mind, as you learn the art of remaining aloof, away from the mind, as you learn the science of creating a distance between you and your own thoughts, more and more meditation will be showering on you" Osho, Philosophia Perennis, Series 2, 5

🌌 OSHO No-Dimensions – Beyond mind, pure freedom!

🤝 Contact Improvisation – Connect body to body.

🌊 5Rhythms – Flow through stillness, chaos, lyrical!

🙏 Gurdjieff Sacred Dances – Ancient patterns of awakening.

Welcoming you to join our Living In program.

This course is for you to stay longer in an environment that supports you go deeper into your meditation.

You can expect:
✅ A daily schedule of OSHO meditations.

be7742c66c6f3465e3d1727b27c62f88.title: OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation
be7742c66c6f3465e3d1727b27c62f88.description: Live online course exploring self-hypnosis and meditation. Work gently with unconscious through guided relaxation and awareness. Optional Facilitator Training available.
be7742c66c6f3465e3d1727b27c62f88.full_text:
OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation explores a different approach: working gently with the unconscious instead of against yourself. Through guided self-hypnosis, relaxation, and awareness, this live online course supports meditation in a more natural way ✨

Optional Facilitator Training also available.

👉🏻 Write "HYPNOSIS" to explore the course and book your FREE Preview!!

🗓️ May 26th – June 1st, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 19th, 2026

"The day you can hypnotize yourself is a great day; something valuable has been achieved. Then you can do miracles with it, upon yourself. You can change things that you have always been trying to change; but the more you try to change them, the more difficult it becomes." Osho, Osho, The Dhammapada: The Way of the Buddha, Vol. 5, 2

b7022599d84b80ad7a8c3d779faa07c8.description: 5-day silent meditation retreat with Ma Dhyan Abha. Daily sunrise meditation, satsang, silent sitting, bardo, zazen, and evening satsang with Osho energy transmission. Advance group for experienced practitioners.

Osho Silence Retreat (5 days)
21 - 25 October, 2026
(Opening - 20th October, evening)
with: Ma Dhyan Abha

"Silence is the soul of meditation..."

Osho has said this many times, and not only Osho, every master has emphasised this.

This Osho silence retreat will make us experience how! In Osho Sanzen, these 5 days will be of silence. Silence that arises naturally is fruitful, in which the seeker does not have to go through struggle.

Morning sunrise meditation, satsang, silent sitting, bardo, zazen and pleasant music will help seekers go deeper with each passing day. Every evening in satsang, Osho energy will shower upon all of us. This is an advance group.

3fa6319f8492515796039917b96b171c.title: Osho Transformation Meditation Camp
3fa6319f8492515796039917b96b171c.description: Three-day meditation camp featuring dynamic meditations, silence, emotional cleansing, celebration, and transformative discourses under Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun's guidance.
3fa6319f8492515796039917b96b171c.full_text:
🌿✨ OSHO TRANSFORMATION MEDITATION CAMP ✨🌿

A Three-Day Journey of Meditation, Awareness & Inner Transformation

In the serene and deeply beautiful atmosphere of Osho Upaban, a rare and transformative meditation camp is being lovingly organized under the guidance, presence, and spiritual energy of Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.

This is not simply a meditation program — it is an invitation to move inward, rediscover silence, awaken awareness, and celebrate life in its totality. Surrounded by nature, meditation, and a vibrant energy field of seekers, these three days can become a profound turning point in one's inner journey.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

079e0f3998d88b6d07ed37f6acb04721.title: OSHO Mystic Rose
079e0f3998d88b6d07ed37f6acb04721.description: 21-day meditative therapy combining laughter, tears, and silence. 7 days of 3-hour daily laughter, 7 days of crying, 7 days of silent sitting.
079e0f3998d88b6d07ed37f6acb04721.full_text:
Some experiences change you forever. OSHO Mystic Rose is one of them — 21 days of laughing, crying, and sitting silently until everything heavy inside finally lets go.

WHAT IS OSHO MYSTIC ROSE?
Laughter, Tears, and Silence.

For 21 days:
🌹 Laugh for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
🌹 Cry for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
🌹 Sit silently for 3 hours a day, for 7 days

WHEN DOES IT START AND HOW CAN I PARTICIPATE?
OSHO Mystic Rose starts on the 11th of every month at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. Whether you're in the Living-In program or joining from outside the Meditation Resort — the door is open.

👉 More information: https://bit.ly/Join-OSHO-Mystic-Rose

Been through Mystic Rose before? Come back deeper, or simply to refresh. As a gesture of support, returning participants are invited again with a 50% contribution.

"The first thing to be done is laughter, because that sets the trend for the whole day. If you wake up laughing, you will soon begin to feel how absurd life is. Nothing is serious: even your disappointments are laughable, even your pain is laughable, even you are laughable."
Osho, Vedanta: Seven Steps to Samadhi, #1

#OSHOMysticRose #MeditativeTherapy #LaughterAndTears #OshoInternationalMeditationResort #MeditationRetreat

c6ea60e6bdf648e8c25ca3ac5c210015.title: Osho Mystic Rose - 21 Day Meditative Therapy
c6ea60e6bdf648e8c25ca3ac5c210015.description: 21-day meditative therapy with three phases: laughter, tears, and silence. Dissolve emotional scars through total participation and awareness.
c6ea60e6bdf648e8c25ca3ac5c210015.full_text:
Don't laugh it off — laugh it on!

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

🗓️ September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course and reserve your place: https://bit.ly/OSHO-MysticRose-Sep2026

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

#meditation #osho #awareness #mysticrose #meditativetherapy #laughter #silence #oshoo

c0a2e052515dd0dbece91133d51c0d42.description: Actress Namrata Sapkota shares message about meditation benefits at Osho Tapoban, emphasizing mental peace, stress reduction and spiritual connection.
c0a2e052515dd0dbece91133d51c0d42.full_text:
Actress Namrata Sapkota has shared a message about the importance of meditation (meditation) through social media. After visiting Osho Tapoban International Commune located in Kathmandu, she has stated that meditation calms the mind, reduces stress and helps in spiritual connection. According to her, practicing meditation for a few minutes daily brings clarity, happiness and positive energy in life.

33803384b36e01841b02f78dc6858a92.title: OSHO Born Again Facilitating Course
33803384b36e01841b02f78dc6858a92.description: 7-day facilitating course learning to hold space for OSHO Born Again process with expression and silent meditation. Facilitators: Sudheer & Asmita.
33803384b36e01841b02f78dc6858a92.full_text:
OSHO Born Again Facilitating – the rare chance to learn how to hold a space where others can become children again.

If you've loved the OSHO Born Again process, you already know its power. One hour of being a child again — dancing, singing, jumping, crying, doing whatever you always wanted to do. The second hour of sitting silently, where after total expression, silence arrives all by itself. No forcing. No fighting the mind.

This 7-day Facilitating Course is offered twice a year at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. Mornings are spent in the regular OSHO Born Again process itself. Afternoons are dedicated to deepening your understanding and learning to facilitate this revolutionary process with care, sensitivity, and presence.

Upcoming date:
17 – 23 August 2026 with Sudheer & Asmita

Prior participation in an OSHO Born Again course is recommended.

More info: https://bit.ly/OSHO-Born-Again-Facilitating
Booking: https://bit.ly/Living-In-Programs-Overview

crop_hint.note: Large group photo, focus on circled facilitator trio

d2b54a755c2f638bad08f78573695680.title: OSHO No-Mind
d2b54a755c2f638bad08f78573695680.description: 7-day meditative therapy: 1 hour daily gibberish speaking (no meaning, no control) + 1 hour silent witnessing. Reduces overthinking, promotes clarity and inner peace.
d2b54a755c2f638bad08f78573695680.full_text:
Have you tried "underthinking"? OSHO No-Mind is not what you think it is.

For 7 days, one hour a day, you speak gibberish — sounds, nonsense, whatever wants to come out. No meaning. No control.

Then for the second hour, you sit silently and witness.
By day 7, the overthinking loosens. You feel lighter, clearer, more like yourself.

OSHO No-Mind happens every month, starting on the 3rd, at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India.

Learn more and join: https://bit.ly/OSHO-No-Mind-Resort

Share this with someone whose mind won't stop talking

cc21f2b72f9ee9a6694533833610ef59.description: Book promotion for 'From Personality to Individuality' by Osho. No event date or venue specified.
cc21f2b72f9ee9a6694533833610ef59.full_text:
From Personality to Individuality 🌿
A journey from borrowed identities to your authentic self.

Osho reminds us—nothing should stand between you and existence. No borrowed beliefs, no intermediaries. Just you, witnessing truth as it is… like a sunrise that needs no explanation.

This book is not about becoming someone—it's about unbecoming all that you are not. A deep dive into trust, truth, and the courage to stand alone in your being.

✨ Drop the personality. Discover individuality.

From the book-From Personality to Individuality

Description:
Osho is a revolutionary who supports the birth of each individual.
"I am trying in every possible way to drop all those things which, in the past, have been barriers for the revolution to continue and grow. I don't want anybody to stand between the individual and existence. No prayer, no priest—you alone are enough to face the sunrise. You don't need somebody to interpret for you what a beautiful sunrise it is." — Osho

About:
Religion, nobody

WhatsApp: 9820065123
To Order the Book

18th - 21st June 2026

WhatsApp: +919058967526

We are guiding a 3 day luxury Osho meditation retreat in the sacred cosmic energy zone of Kasar Devi.

Stay in Almora's finest luxury resort, which in itself is an architectural delight. With Osho Active Meditations running throughout, daily.

Come, enjoy your comfort, while playing in this highly conscious energy zone (recognized in only 3 places in the world - the other 2 spots being Macchu Pichu and Stone Henge.)

Also, please note- our retreats and camps are safe spaces and your wellbeing is our highest priority- we have kicked people off our retreats for unwanted inappropriate behaviour before. If you have sexy ideas about Osho outside meditation, relaxation and awareness - we are not the place for you.

But if you are into going deep in this special energy zone- do yourself a favor and make sure you come!

5292d28541344bb65bf24ee56e89f6d2.title: May 2026 Rishikesh Meditation Camp
5292d28541344bb65bf24ee56e89f6d2.description: Osho meditation camp in Rishikesh featuring facilitators Christine and Sarju offering breathwork and meditation guidance.
5292d28541344bb65bf24ee56e89f6d2.full_text:
Meet Your Facilitators for the May 2026 Rishikesh Meditation Camp

CHRISTINE
Christine was born in Australia and has been on the path of inner exploration since 2008, when she began learning meditation at the London Buddhist Centre.
Previously working as a Humanities teacher up to management level, she realized that the best way to bring change to the world is to start from within herself - so in 2021 she redirected her career towards conscious and spiritual work. She is trained in Osho Meditation and other 'breathwork' practices; and for the past 5 years she has guided meditation and breathwork in London (UK), Australia, India, Osho International Meditation Resort (Pune), as well as through online platforms.
In the UK, she has shared her work from psychiatric hospitals to schools for children with criminal tendencies, corporate wellness and community relaxation sessions. Christine provides a safe space for emotional release, connecting with one's true nature and experimenting with consciousness, so that individuals can become more empowered by knowing themselves and existence.

SARJU
Sarju was born in Gujarat (India) and has been an Osho sannyasin since 2008.
Before this, he ran an oil mill and tire plant as an entrepreneur, and also worked in construction management in London.
While running his business in India, he often stayed for long periods at Osho ashrams in Madhapur, Mehsana and Pune, where he had the opportunity to go deep within himself. During his exploration of 'Zorba the Buddha,' he learned the great value of Zen discipline and incorporates this principle into his work, helping others discover and know their own truth.
Sarju informally began teaching friends breathing techniques and practices, which turned into facilitation of Osho Meditation in 2022. He has conducted many intensive and personal sessions in London, Osho International Meditation Resort in Pune and across India.

#meditationcamp #osho #oshomeditation #osho #rishikesh

4b7f8863b073e8e56de41f1b8abb6bbb.title: Hidden Ties, Inner Voices: Family Constellations and Internal Mind Systems
4b7f8863b073e8e56de41f1b8abb6bbb.description: Weekend exploration using Family Constellations and Internal Mind Systems frameworks to illuminate internalized beliefs, inherited family voices, and unconscious mind patterns for personal growth and awareness.
4b7f8863b073e8e56de41f1b8abb6bbb.full_text:
Hidden Ties, Inner Voices: Family Constellations and Internal Mind Systems

Facilitator: Subhan Schenker

Dates: June 27-28, 2026

Venue: Quest Haven Retreat Center
Location: San Marcos, CA

Workshop Overview:
In this weekend exploration, Subhan will be working with the Family Constellations framework that can help illuminate the different internalized beliefs and "voices" unconsciously inherited from families. These often influence and guide choices and behaviors, and contribute to conflicts and struggles in life.

Additionally, he will utilize the Internal Mind Systems framework to reveal the different "parts" (personas, character structures, and developmental stages) that live seemingly frozen within the mind. These parts have become the unconscious filters through which reality passes and from which we react to life.

By using these 2 modalities, participants can begin the process of bringing more awareness to how these parts of the mind impact daily life, and begin to loosen the patterned grip they impose.

For more information, visit: www.oshoniranjana.org

Contact: Osho Niranjana Center
Website: www.oshoniranjana.org/event-details/family-constellations-internal-mind-systems-workshop-1

2f76e983acfc5d28ccd4ca0d65908ed9.title: OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis
2f76e983acfc5d28ccd4ca0d65908ed9.description: Live online course exploring stress management through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness to develop a relaxed relationship with yourself.
2f76e983acfc5d28ccd4ca0d65908ed9.full_text:
Are you comfortable just being with yourself? 🌿

Many forms of stress come from the feeling that we always need to do something, solve something, improve something, or move somewhere else.

OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis explores relaxation from another angle: learning how to work gently with the unconscious so the body and mind can return to ease 🌹

Through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness, this live online course supports a more relaxed and natural relationship with yourself — one where rest becomes possible again.

🗓️ June 13th – 14th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • Sat & Sun • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 7th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "STRESS" in the comments.

"Relaxation comes to you when there is no urge for activity; the energy is at home, not moving anywhere. If a certain situation arises you will act, that's all, but you are not finding some excuse to act. You are at ease with yourself. Relaxation is to be at home."

Osho, Tantra: The Supreme Understanding, 4

#meditation #osho #awareness #stressmanagement #selfhypnosis #relaxation #innerwork #oshoonline

a2578da0a19aca9e5efe0b921e5b40dc.title: Mystic Rose - 21-Day Meditative Therapy
a2578da0a19aca9e5efe0b921e5b40dc.description: 21-day meditative therapy combining laughter, tears, and silence. Week 1: Laughter, Week 2: Tears, Week 3: Silence. 3 hours daily. Free preview on June 24th, 2026.
a2578da0a19aca9e5efe0b921e5b40dc.full_text:
When was the last time you laughed so totally that thinking disappeared? 🌩️

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

🗓️ September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "ROSE" to explore the course and reserve your place.

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

#meditation #osho #awareness #mysticrose #meditativetherapy #laughter #silence #oshoo

7389c532cc17d4d43bfb4de10664f47f.title: Shamanic Healing Retreat
7389c532cc17d4d43bfb4de10664f47f.description: Four-day shamanic healing retreat featuring Kambo, Sananga, Sweat Lodge, Forest Bathing, and Osho Kundalini Meditation in nature.
7389c532cc17d4d43bfb4de10664f47f.full_text:
SHAMANIC HEALING RETREAT

27–30 August, 2026
📍 Zorba the Buddha, Delhi

✨ Your body is constantly speaking.
Sometimes through vitality.
Sometimes through exhaustion.

When life becomes crowded with stress, noise, emotional weight, and endless doing, the body often asks for something simple:

Space.

🌿 Space to release.
🌿 Space to listen.
🌿 Space to reconnect.

For four days, we gather in nature to explore ancient cleansing practices, meditation, silence, movement, and community.

🍁 The journey includes:

🐸 Kambo
👁️ Sananga
🔥 Sweat Lodge
🌳 Forest Bathing
⚡ Osho Kundalini Meditation

Each offering invites a different kind of cleansing—physical, emotional, energetic, and spiritual.

☘️ Participants often describe:
• Feeling lighter
• Greater clarity
• Renewed energy
• Deeper connection with themselves
• A sense of inner calm and balance

💬
"After participating in Shamanic Plant Medicine ceremonies, I feel more peaceful in my mind and stable in my health. It has also helped me control my weight naturally."
- Antas

🌿 In the heart of nature, surrounded by trees, birdsong, and conscious community, this retreat becomes an opportunity to step away from the familiar and remember what it feels like to simply be.

Zorba the Buddha • Delhi

crop_hint.note: Seated figure, event context requires upper-body framing

1c10cac92cf6b2388ed0e9d3da0fdcf2.title: Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival
1c10cac92cf6b2388ed0e9d3da0fdcf2.description: Residential spiritual dance festival combining ecstatic dance, music, and meditation for inner awakening and transformation.
1c10cac92cf6b2388ed0e9d3da0fdcf2.full_text:
🔥🕉️ NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 💃✨
🌙 Dance Your Way Into Silence…

There are moments when words are not enough…
when the heart longs to express, release & celebrate 🌿

Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival is an invitation to move beyond the mind and enter a deeper experience of awareness through dance, music & meditation 🎶🕊️

Here, dance is not about perfection…
It is about freedom.
It is about losing yourself so completely in movement that only presence remains ✨

💫 When the body moves totally,
the mind becomes silent…
and meditation begins naturally.

Inspired by the spirit of celebration, devotion & consciousness, this festival creates a sacred space where movement transforms into inner awakening 🔥

🌸 Through ecstatic dance, music, meditation & collective energy, you may experience:

✨ Release of stress & emotional heaviness
✨ Deep relaxation & inner calm
✨ Joy, playfulness & freedom of expression
✨ A stronger connection with yourself & others
✨ Silence, awareness & meditative bliss

Like Shiva Nataraj - the cosmic dancer -
every movement becomes sacred, every breath becomes alive 🌺💃

No matter your age or experience, you are welcome exactly as you are 🌙
You do not need to know dance…
your soul already understands the rhythm ❤️

🌿 Open for both Women & Men
🎶 Celebrate • Dance • Meditate • Transform ✨

📍 Zorba The Buddha
📅 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival

📞+91 93119 58352

💫 Come as you are…
Leave lighter, freer & more connected to your inner self 🌸

✨ At Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival, Dance becomes Meditation… and Celebration becomes a Path to the Divine. 🕉️🔥

#NatarajSpiritualDanceFestival #DanceMeditation #SpiritualDance #MeditationInMotion #ZorbaTheBuddha

a04f52e34c201db4657826b8f85e8fa6.description: Soulful blend of Sufi melodies, folk rhythms, and timeless songs with Anuragi on vocals & guitar and Gulshan on percussion.
a04f52e34c201db4657826b8f85e8fa6.full_text:
✨ SUFI FUSION EVENING
Live & Soulful

🌻 Beloveds,

SUFIANA MEHFIL
An evening soaked in Ishq, Sufi vibes & soulful melodies…

Under the moonlit skies of Zorba The Buddha, amidst lotus ponds, whispering trees & wandering peacocks… step into a magical night where music becomes meditation.

Join us for an unforgettable live experience with Kesari Band — bringing together timeless Sufi kalaams, devotional melodies & heart-touching music that awakens love, longing & bliss within.

A night to sing, feel, sway & dissolve into the beauty of togetherness…

Sometimes ecstatic…
Sometimes meditative…
Sometimes so silent that only the heart can listen…

Begin the evening with a lavish organic vegetarian buffet dinner before diving into this soulful Mehfil.

• Akshat Verma (Vocal)

3eb4c2dcb5f47f107d1359a2bc180f89.description: Book promotion for 'From Personality to Individuality' by Osho. WhatsApp contact provided for ordering.
3eb4c2dcb5f47f107d1359a2bc180f89.full_text:
From Personality to Individuality 🌿
A journey from borrowed identities to your authentic self.

Osho reminds us—nothing should stand between you and existence. No borrowed beliefs, no intermediaries. Just you, witnessing truth as it is… like a sunrise that needs no explanation.

This book is not about becoming someone—it's about unbecoming all that you are not. A deep dive into trust, truth, and the courage to stand alone in your being.

✨ Drop the personality. Discover individuality.

From the book - From Personality to Individuality

Description:
Osho is a revolutionary who supports the birth of each individual.
"I am trying in every possible way to drop all those things which, in the past, have been barriers for the revolution to continue and grow. I don't want anybody to stand between the individual and existence. No prayer, no priest—you alone are enough to face the sunrise. You don't need somebody to interpret for you what a beautiful sunrise it is." — Osho

About:
Religion, nobody

WhatsApp: 9820065123
To Order the Book

A voice can become medicine.

Of the voice you silenced.
Of the peace you've been searching for.
Of the rhythm your soul already knows. 🌿

and leave lighter, open & alive.

76ffb5a77701d6ee87e899dac27a68e3.title: Hidden Ties, Inner Voices: Family Constellations and Internal Mind Systems
76ffb5a77701d6ee87e899dac27a68e3.description: Weekend exploration using Family Constellations and Internal Mind Systems frameworks to illuminate internalized beliefs, inherited family voices, and unconscious mental patterns affecting behavior and life choices.
76ffb5a77701d6ee87e899dac27a68e3.full_text:
Hidden Ties, Inner Voices: Family Constellations and Internal Mind Systems

Facilitator: Subhan Schenker

Dates: June 27-28, 2026
Venue: Quest Haven Retreat Center
City: San Marcos, CA, USA

Description:
In this weekend exploration, Subhan will be working with the Family Constellations framework that can help illuminate the different internalized beliefs and "voices" we unconsciously inherited from our families. These so often influence and guide our choices and behaviors, as well as contribute to the conflict and struggles we have in our lives.

Also, he will be utilizing the Internal Mind Systems framework to assist in revealing the different "parts" (i.e. personas, character structures, and developmental stages) that live seemingly frozen within our mind. It is these parts that have become the unconscious filters which our reality passes through and we react to life from.

By using these 2 modalities we can start the process of bringing more awareness to how these parts of the mind impact us daily, and begin to loosen the patterned grip they impose.

For more information, visit: www.oshoniranjana.org
Event Details and Registration: https://www.oshoniranjana.org/event-details/family-constellations-internal-mind-systems-workshop-1

Organizer: Osho Niranjana Center

3e8017464b02f6148b629d06e68f5118.title: Nourishment Workshop with Jayesh
3e8017464b02f6148b629d06e68f5118.description: Explore real nourishment through experiential practices. Create space to experience what fills you up emotionally and spiritually.
3e8017464b02f6148b629d06e68f5118.full_text:
Nourishment Workshop with Jayesh

What if nourishment was something you could practice, not just imagine?

3 Tips to Try Right Now:
💛 Pause for 30 seconds: Close your eyes and notice what actually feels good in your body right now.
💛 Feel warmth: Think of a person, a place or any moment that made you smile… remember as if it's happening now.
💛 Give: A kind word, a hug, or a smile to someone nearby.

Real nourishment isn't an idea. It's something you recognize when you feel it.

Try the steps above. Notice what shifts. You might be surprised how much is already there.

This is what we'll explore together in the Nourishment workshop with Jayesh. We'll create space to experience, in a very real way, what fills you up.

#Nourishment #SelfConnection #FeelMore #EmotionalWellbeing #AuthenticLiving

2cfdcd9fa12f1b0f66765ccf0852f498.title: Healing Sexual Trauma
2cfdcd9fa12f1b0f66765ccf0852f498.description: Conscious sexuality workshop focused on healing sexual trauma through awareness, safety, and honest communication.
2cfdcd9fa12f1b0f66765ccf0852f498.full_text:
Healing Sexual Trauma | 25 June - 1 July

Conscious Sexuality workshops at Humaniversity

Over the years, I have met thousands of people who carried a quiet question within themselves: "Why does something so natural feel so complicated?"

Sexuality is one of the most fundamental expressions of being human. It is present long before we understand it intellectually, and it continues to shape our sense of aliveness, confidence, and connection throughout life. And yet, for many people, sexuality is also one of the places where shame, confusion, and pain have settled most deeply.

Conscious Sexuality workshops exist because sexuality is rarely given the space it truly needs. Not a space of advice, technique, or performance, but a space of awareness, safety, and honest meetings and communication.

At Humaniversity, sexuality work has been part of our therapeutic approach for decades. We have seen, again and again, that when sexuality is met with respect, awareness and friendship, it becomes a powerful gateway to healing, sovereignty, and joy.

With love,
Sambodhi

2a41263a1b24d0bded50d0df114624dc.title: OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis
2a41263a1b24d0bded50d0df114624dc.description: Live online course exploring relaxation through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness to develop a relaxed relationship with yourself.
2a41263a1b24d0bded50d0df114624dc.full_text:
Are you comfortable just being with yourself? 🌿

Many forms of stress come from the feeling that we always need to do something, solve something, improve something, or move somewhere else.

OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis explores relaxation from another angle: learning how to work gently with the unconscious so the body and mind can return to ease 🌹

Through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness, this live online course supports a more relaxed and natural relationship with yourself — one where rest becomes possible again.

🗓️ June 13th – 14th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • Sat & Sun • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 7th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "STRESS" in the comments.

"Relaxation comes to you when there is no urge for activity; the energy is at home, not moving anywhere. If a certain situation arises you will act, that's all, but you are not finding some excuse to act. You are at ease with yourself. Relaxation is to be at home."

Osho, Tantra: The Supreme Understanding, 4

#meditation #osho #awareness #stressmanagement #selfhypnosis #relaxation #innerwork #oshoonline

2f9172be414d1d0404d778ca739d032a.description: 21-day meditative therapy combining laughter, tears, and silence to dissolve emotional scars through total participation and awareness.
2f9172be414d1d0404d778ca739d032a.full_text:
When was the last time you laughed so totally that thinking disappeared? 🌩️

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

🗓️ September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "ROSE" to explore the course and reserve your place.

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

#meditation #osho #awareness #mysticrose #meditativetherapy #laughter #silence #oshoo

Circle of Mystical Dances

Unlock your true essence every Thursday evening!

Through free-form dance, celebration & deep meditation.

Rooted in Osho's timeless wisdom & yogic flow.
Movement becomes a doorway to silence, bliss & balance.

Explore 1 of 14 transformative conscious dances weekly:

❤️ Heart Dance – Open your heart's wild rhythm!
🔥 Elemental Dance – Channel earth, fire, water, air!
🌀 Chakra Dance – Activate your energy centers.
⏹️ OSHO Gurdjieff Stop Dance – Sudden awareness bursts!
🎨 Creative Movement Therapy – Heal through expression.
🦋 Dance of Evolution – Journey through life's stages!
🌀 Sufi Whirling Primal Dance – Spin into the divine.
🌌 OSHO No-Dimensions – Beyond mind, pure freedom!
🤝 Contact Improvisation – Connect body to body.
🌊 5Rhythms – Flow through stillness, chaos, lyrical!
🙏 Gurdjieff Sacred Dances – Ancient patterns of awakening.
🎉 Ecstatic Dance – Let go & surrender to joy!
☮️ Dances of Universal Peace – Harmony in unity.

At Zorba the Buddha, Osho Mystical Village – a safe haven for joyful self-expression & inner exploration.

Sessions start at 7 PM: Mystical dance immersion.
Followed by organic buffet dinner in communal bliss!

No dance experience required – just presence & openness!
Beginners & experts welcome to this sacred circle.

Real Transformations:
"Reconnected with my inner child–pure magic!" – Sameera

📅 Every Thursday, 7 PM onwards
📱 Contact: +91 93119 58352

4e11f54a70489d308428c583a4e1ef2c.description: Live online course for women combining meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry to foster self-acceptance and embodied connection.
4e11f54a70489d308428c583a4e1ef2c.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one the world taught you to perform 🌹

"Over time, we can feel cut off from our own bodies… from who we truly are." 
Kimaya

As women, many of us learned to see ourselves through expectations, appearance, and outside opinions. Over time, it can become difficult to feel truly connected to the body — or at ease inside it 🌿

OSHO BodyLove for Women is a live online course created for women who long to feel more relaxed, accepting, and at home in themselves through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry.

A space where self-criticism softens and a more natural connection with yourself begins to grow ✨

🗓️ June 6th & 7th, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 30th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "BODYLOVE" to explore the course.

#meditation #osho #awareness #bodylove #embodiedawareness #womenandmeditation #selfacceptance #oshoonline

536c83bc348ee452d70112d915bdfc82.description: Live online course for women exploring body connection through feeling, awareness, relaxation, movement, and presence beyond self-judgment.

Be the woman you feel, not the one you see 🌹

So much energy goes into looking at ourselves from the outside.

OSHO BodyLove for Women explores another possibility: relating to the body through feeling, awareness, relaxation, movement, and presence 🌿

A live online course created for women who want a more loving and conscious connection with themselves — beyond image, performance, or self-judgment.

🗓️ June 6th & 7th, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 30th, 2026

4718c38835f95cf84982600b6e780f14.title: May 2026 Rishikesh Meditation Camp
4718c38835f95cf84982600b6e780f14.description: Osho meditation camp in Rishikesh featuring facilitators Christine and Sarju guiding breathwork and meditation practices.
4718c38835f95cf84982600b6e780f14.full_text:
May 2026 Rishikesh Meditation Camp - Meet Your Facilitators

CHRISTINE
Christine was born in Australia and has been on the path of inner search since 2008, when she started learning meditation at the London Buddhist Centre.
Previously working as a Humanities teacher up to management level, she realized that the best way to bring change to the world is to start from within - so in 2021 she redirected her career towards conscious and spiritual work. She is trained in Osho meditation and other breathwork practices; and for the past 5 years she has facilitated meditation and breathwork in London (UK), Australia, India, Osho International Meditation Resort (Pune), as well as online.
In the UK she has shared her work from psychiatric hospitals to schools for children with criminal tendencies, corporate wellness and community relaxation sessions. Christine provides a safe space for emotional liberation, connecting with one's true nature and experimenting with consciousness, so that individuals become more empowered by knowing themselves and existence.

SARJU
Sarju was born in Gujarat (India) and has been an Osho sannyasin since 2008.
Previously he ran an oil mill and tire plant as an entrepreneur, and has also worked in construction management in London.
While running his business in India, he often stayed for extended periods at Osho ashrams in Madhavpur, Mehsana and Pune, where he had the opportunity to go deeply within himself. During his search for 'Zorba the Buddha', he learned the great value of Zen discipline and incorporates this principle into his work to help others discover and know their own truth.
Sarju started informally teaching friends breathing techniques and practices, which evolved into facilitating Osho meditation in 2022. He has conducted many intensive and personal sessions in London, Osho International Meditation Resort in Pune and across India.

#meditationcamp #osho #oshomeditation #rishikesh

Thank you to all the wonderful participants who came and shared your energy with the group.

So wonderful to meet you all. Life long connections definitely made.

In June we are taking our meditation camp up to Kasar Devi chasing the cooler climate. The mountains also being a special energy, and Kasar itself has an unusually strong geomagnetic field. This supports meditation with such ease.

If you'd like to join us in Kasar Devi, WhatsApp +919058967526.

And if you're wanting to join us in Rishikesh, follow @oshobliss_experiences to stay up to date with when we'll be back.

5ebf0652570034f6ea39ebd6317d9178.title: Osho Luxury Meditation Retreat at Kasar Devi
5ebf0652570034f6ea39ebd6317d9178.description: 3-day luxury Osho retreat with daily active meditations in Kasar Devi's cosmic energy zone. For Osho practitioners and those interested in somatic therapy.
5ebf0652570034f6ea39ebd6317d9178.full_text:
18th - 21st June 2026

WhatsApp: +919058967526

We are guiding a 3 day luxury Osho meditation retreat in the sacred cosmic energy zone of Kasar Devi.

Stay in Almora's finest luxury resort, which in itself is an architectural delight. With Osho Active Meditations running throughout, daily.

Come, enjoy your comfort, while playing in this highly conscious energy zone (recognized in only 3 places in the world - the other 2 spots being Macchu Pichu and Stone Henge.)

This retreat is for people who are familiar with Osho and are interested in his active meditations (the original somatic therapy) or would like to learn.

Also, please note- our retreats and camps are safe spaces and your wellbeing is our highest priority- we have kicked people off our retreats for unwanted inappropriate behaviour before. If you have sexy ideas about Osho outside meditation, relaxation and awareness - we are not the place for you.

But if you are into going deep in this special energy zone- do yourself a favor and make sure you come!

#osho #luxuryretreat #activemeditation #kasardevi

26a81f1d10703243522e6faf8e2612ec.full_text:
Be here, not there 🌿

The mind is constantly pulling attention somewhere else: later, earlier, elsewhere.

OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind is a live online course exploring simple and practical meditation methods that create space between you and your thoughts — so presence becomes something felt, not forced.

A playful exploration of four ways to find the mind's off switch ✨

🗓️ May 18th – May 22nd, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 13th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "QUIET" in the comments, and get the invitation to the course in your DMs!

"As you become skillful, as you learn the knack of not getting involved in the mind, as you learn the art of remaining aloof, away from the mind, as you learn the science of creating a distance between you and your own thoughts, more and more meditation will be showering on you" Osho, Philosophia Perennis, Series 2, 5

#meditation #osho #awareness #mindfulness #meditationpractice #presence #innerpeace #consciousliving

8d58d0f546f9dc47da62d2a3f2746ee4.title: Osho Ashram Meditation Retreat
8d58d0f546f9dc47da62d2a3f2746ee4.description: Three-day meditation retreat at Osho Ashram featuring meditation sessions, accommodation, and meals. Open to all seekers.
8d58d0f546f9dc47da62d2a3f2746ee4.full_text:
Next retreat 21-24 May 2026.

A review from our latest retreat 🤩

I have come to the Osho Ashram for a three-day retreat. One meditation session has just ended, and another is about to begin. This is our hall where the meditation takes place, and these are all the Swamis and seekers here between sessions.

The main reason I'm making this video is this: for anyone who has misconceptions about what happens at Osho—thinking it's like this or like that—let me clear it up for you.

It's only meditation. You get great sleep and good food. Everyone should come here. If you're already happy and doing well in life, it's not necessary, but I think you should experience everything life has to offer.

There are many Hindus here, people from Gujarat, and many Muslims as well...

To book the next one - WhatsApp +919058967526. (The only booking number).

#oshobliss #meditationcamp #osho #retreat rishikesh

9e6fd8e6ea0ad06ff0cdb1453244c983.full_text:
Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh

Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. This retreat is a weekend reset for sincere seekers, experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness, or the weight of life's pressures; so they can reconnect to their own inner essence. A familiarity with Osho is a requirement - from reading his books, listening to his discourses or doing his meditation techniques and practices.

Includes:
• Kundalini and active dynamic meditations running through the day in the Buddha Hall and nature based spaces including the Ganga Ghats
• Range of accommodations to suit all budgets with room sharing options and private AC rooms. Starting price is ₹4300 for the 3 days, for dorm bed package.
• 3 satvik meals daily + some drinks included in cost.
• Meditations guided in Hindi and English.

7 - 10th May
Dhyan Mandir, Lalkadi Ghat, Rishikesh

*(Arrive 4pm first Day, Finish 2pm Last day)

For more info or bookings:
+919898346475

Instagram: @oshobliss28

92c2ecf1e530a00a8f9b40abe6a92987.description: 5-day silent meditation retreat with Ma Dhyan Abha. Daily sunrise meditation, satsang, silent sitting, bardo, zazen, and music to deepen meditative experience.
92c2ecf1e530a00a8f9b40abe6a92987.full_text:
ओशो Silence Retreat (5 days)
21 - 25 Oct, 2026
(Opening - 20th Oct, evening)
With: Ma Dhyan Abha

"Silence is the soul of meditation..." 

Osho has said this many times, and not only Osho, but every master has emphasized this...

This Osho silence retreat will help us experience how! These 5 days in Osho Sanzen will be in silence. Silence that arises naturally is fruitful, where the seeker does not have to go through struggle.

Morning sunrise meditation, satsang, silent sitting, bardo, zazen and soothing music will help seekers go deeper with each passing day.

Every evening in satsang, Osho's energy will shower upon all of us. This is an advanced group.

If you wish to experience yourself closely, you are welcome:-

744ebfff7054ccb82ad2c7d52cb39014.title: Osho Transformation Meditation Camp
744ebfff7054ccb82ad2c7d52cb39014.description: Three-day meditation camp with dynamic meditations, silence, emotional cleansing, discourses, and celebration under guidance of Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.
744ebfff7054ccb82ad2c7d52cb39014.full_text:
OSHO JEEVAN RUPANTARAN DHYAN SHIVIR / Osho Transformation Meditation Camp

A Three-Day Journey of Meditation, Awareness & Inner Transformation

In the serene and deeply beautiful atmosphere of Osho Upaban, a rare and transformative meditation camp is being lovingly organized under the guidance, presence, and spiritual energy of Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.

This is not simply a meditation program — it is an invitation to move inward, rediscover silence, awaken awareness, and celebrate life in its totality. Surrounded by nature, meditation, and a vibrant energy field of seekers, these three days can become a profound turning point in one's inner journey.

VENUE:
Osho Upaban, Dobilla–17, Pokhara

CAMP DATES:
June 12 – June 14, 2026 (Jestha 29, 30 & 31, 2083)

ARRIVAL & REGISTRATION:
June 11, 2026 (Jestha 28), From 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM

CAMP INAUGURATION & OPENING MEDITATION SESSION:
Begins from 5:00 PM onwards

FACILITATOR & SPIRITUAL GUIDE:
Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun

BOOKING & INFORMATION:
+977 984-0600056

HIGHLIGHTS OF THE CAMP:
✨ Dynamic & Active Meditations
✨ Deep Silence & Inner Stillness
✨ Emotional Cleansing & Awareness
✨ Celebration, Dance & Joyfulness
✨ Powerful Meditative Energy Field
✨ Transformative Discourses & Guidance
✨ A Loving Community of Seekers

"Meditation is the journey from mind to no-mind, from noise to silence, from personality to presence." — Osho

If your heart longs for peace, clarity, love, and transformation… If you wish to experience meditation beyond words and concepts… Then this sacred gathering at Osho Upaban may become an unforgettable doorway toward a new consciousness.

cc45671286ec62f3d0073142a9f1c16e.title: OSHO Born Again Facilitating Course
cc45671286ec62f3d0073142a9f1c16e.description: 7-day facilitating course learning to hold space for OSHO Born Again process. Mornings include the process itself; afternoons focus on deepening understanding and facilitation skills.
cc45671286ec62f3d0073142a9f1c16e.full_text:
OSHO Born Again Facilitating – the rare chance to learn how to hold a space where others can become children again.

If you've loved the OSHO Born Again process, you already know its power. One hour of being a child again — dancing, singing, jumping, crying, doing whatever you always wanted to do. The second hour of sitting silently, where after total expression, silence arrives all by itself. No forcing. No fighting the mind.

This 7-day Facilitating Course is offered twice a year at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. Mornings are spent in the regular OSHO Born Again process itself. Afternoons are dedicated to deepening your understanding and learning to facilitate this revolutionary process with care, sensitivity, and presence.

📅 Upcoming date:
🌹 17 – 23 August 2026 with Sudheer & Asmita

✨ Prior participation in an OSHO Born Again course is recommended.

More info: https://bit.ly/OSHO-Born-Again-Facilitating
Booking: https://bit.ly/Living-In-Programs-Overview

"They are trying to enforce their ambitions on the child; that's how conditioning begins. They are not allowing the child to be himself. No parent ever allows the child to be himself; it has not happened up to now. That's why humanity is living in such misery: because no child is allowed to be himself. How can he be happy? Happiness happens only when you are authentically yourself."
Osho, The Greatest Joy of Life

Send this to someone who has been touched by OSHO Born Again ✨

#OSHOBornAgainFacilitating #OSHOMeditativeTherapy #OshoInternationalMeditationResort #InnerChild #ActiveMeditation #PuneIndia

9cfc2018c9fb3d874adc533c392580b2.title: OSHO No-Mind
9cfc2018c9fb3d874adc533c392580b2.description: 7-day meditative therapy combining one hour daily gibberish speaking with silent witnessing to reduce overthinking and mental chatter.
9cfc2018c9fb3d874adc533c392580b2.full_text:
Have you tried "underthinking"? OSHO No-Mind is not what you think it is.

For 7 days, one hour a day, you speak gibberish — sounds, nonsense, whatever wants to come out. No meaning. No control.

Then for the second hour, you sit silently and witness.

By day 7, the overthinking loosens. You feel lighter, clearer, more like yourself.

OSHO No-Mind happens every month, starting on the 3rd, at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India.

Learn more and join: https://bit.ly/OSHO-No-Mind-Resort

Share this with someone whose mind won't stop talking 🌀
